mapper.select: SELECT RSK_CATG AS CD, RSK_CATG_NM AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_CATG_I ORDER BY RSK_CATG
/* RBA_common_getComboData_KRBA_RSK_CA2 사업위험용 */ SELECT RSK_CATG AS CD, RSK_CATG_NM AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_CATG_I WHERE RSK_CATG IN ('5','6','7') --사업위험 카테고리만 ORDER BY RSK_CATG

/* RBA_common_getComboData_KRBA_RSK_EV3 - 사업위험용 */
SELECT A.RSK_CATG||B.RSK_FAC||A.RSK_EVT AS CD,
A.RSK_EVT_NM||' ('||C.RSK_CATG_NM||')' AS CD_NM
FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I A
, KRBA_RSK_FAC_I B
, KRBA_RSK_CATG_I C
WHERE 1=1
AND A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG
AND A.RSK_FAC = B.RSK_FAC
AND A.RSK_CATG = C.RSK_CATG
AND A.RSK_EVT_NM != 'N/A'
AND A.RSK_CATG IN ('5','6','7') /*사업위험 카테고리만*/
AND A.RSK_CATG = #{HGRK_DTL_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT

SELECT A.*, GET_DEP_NAME(DEP_ID) AS DEP_ID_NM, (SELECT DEP_DESC FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_ID = A.DEP_ID) DEP_DESC, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD='EMPL_JBTT_CODE' AND CNTNT=a.EMPL_JBTT_CODE) POSITION_NM FROM C_USER A WHERE LOGIN_ID LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' OR USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
SELECT * FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_NM LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' AND USE_CCD = 'Y'
SELECT BAS_YYYY AS CD, BAS_YYYY||'년' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY NOT IN ('9999') ORDER BY BAS_YYYY DESC

SELECT A.DPRT_CD, A.DPRT_NM, A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, A.MOFC_BRN_CCD, A.DPRT_POST_NO, A.TEL_NO, A.USE_CCD, A.AML_CRT_DT, A.KFB_DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B A JOIN KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I B ON A.DPRT_CD = B.BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND A.DPRT_NM LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'

--평가 회차 (화면마다 조금씩 틀릴수 있음) : 회차별 조칙관리 (평가회차) SELECT VALT_TRN AS CD , VALT_TRN||'회차' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_MNG_ACT_C IN ('4','5') GROUP BY VALT_TRN ORDER BY VALT_TRN DESC

-- : 위험산출조회 (조직별) (RBA_30_03_03_01) 등 노출위험, 통계데이터 관련화면 : 최종회차 (99) 포함 SELECT VALT_TRN AS CD , (CASE WHEN VALT_TRN = 99 THEN '최종' ELSE TO_CHAR(VALT_TRN) END)||'회차' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_TRN ORDER BY VALT_TRN DESC

--: 통제활동 운영평가 (RBA_30_04_03_01) 등 운영평가 관련화면 : 최종회차 (99) 제외 SELECT VALT_TRN AS CD , VALT_TRN||'회차' AS CD_NM FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN != 99 GROUP BY VALT_TRN ORDER BY VALT_TRN DESC
SELECT 1 AS CD , '1회차' AS CD_NM FROM dual
SELECT BAS_YYMM, REAL_EDT FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYYY FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B02'
SELECT NVL(ING_STEP,0) FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS BAS_YYYY FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999')
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0', '11', '12', '22')) /* 본점담당자 */
AND A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('21') /* 본점책임자 */

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999')
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0', '11', '12', '22')) /* 본점담당자 */
AND A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('21') /* 본점책임자 */

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I A JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') AND B.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22')) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22')) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21' GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21' GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I A JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') AND B.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22')) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22')) GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21' GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21' GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT /*위험평가지표결재건*/ FROM SRBA_V_RSK_JIPYO_M A WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912')
AND (GYLJ_ROLE_ID ='4' OR GYLJ_S_C='0' OR GYLJ_S_C='11' OR GYLJ_S_C IS null)
AND GYLJ_ROLE_ID = '5'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I A , (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I A , (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'

SELECT NVL((VALT01),0) AS CNT /*ML/TF 수기처리건*/ FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,T02.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(T01.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_HRSK_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T01.BAS_YYMM AND VALT_BRNO = T02.VALT_BRNO) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M T01 , SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO T02 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_LGDV_C = T02.PROC_LGDV_C AND T01.PROC_MDDV_C = T02.PROC_MDDV_C AND T01.PROC_SMDV_C = T02.PROC_SMDV_C AND T01.VALT_METH_C = '2' AND T02.TGT_YN = '1' GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T02.VALT_BRNO )T03 WHERE T03.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND T03.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT NVL((VALT01),0) AS CNT /*ML/TF 수기처리건*/ FROM ( SELECT T01.BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM ,T02.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO ,COUNT(T01.BAS_YYMM) AS VALT01 ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA_V_HRSK_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = T01.BAS_YYMM AND VALT_BRNO = T02.VALT_BRNO) AS VALT02 FROM SRBA_V_PROC_M T01 , SRBA_V_PROC_BRNO T02 , SRBA_V_HRSK_R T03 WHERE T01.BAS_YYMM = T02.BAS_YYMM AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T02.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_LGDV_C = T02.PROC_LGDV_C AND T01.PROC_MDDV_C = T02.PROC_MDDV_C AND T01.PROC_SMDV_C = T02.PROC_SMDV_C AND T01.BAS_YYMM = T03.BAS_YYMM AND T02.VALT_BRNO = T03.VALT_BRNO AND T01.PROC_FLD_C = T03.PROC_FLD_C AND T01.PROC_SMDV_C = T03.PROC_SMDV_C AND T01.PROC_LGDV_C = T03.PROC_LGDV_C AND T01.PROC_MDDV_C = T03.PROC_MDDV_C AND T01.VALT_METH_C = '2' AND T02.TGT_YN = '1' AND T03.RSK_VALT_PNT IS NULL GROUP BY T01.BAS_YYMM,T02.VALT_BRNO )T03 WHERE T03.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND T03.VALT_BRNO =#{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.FIX_YN = 0 AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 부점

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.FIX_YN = 0 AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 부점

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT /*AML통제처리건*/ FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R A, SRBA_V_TONGJE_M B WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ((TONGJE_VALD_PNT IS NULL AND B.VALT_METH_C IN ('O4') ) OR DSGN_VALT_PNT is null ) AND A.PROC_FLD_C = B.PROC_FLD_C (+) AND A.PROC_LGDV_C = B.PROC_LGDV_C(+) AND A.PROC_MDDV_C= B.PROC_MDDV_C(+) AND A.PROC_SMDV_C = B.PROC_SMDV_C(+) AND A.TONGJE_NO = B.TONGJE_NO(+) AND A.BAS_YYMM = B.BAS_YYMM AND B.VALT_METH_C IN ('O4')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT /*AML통제처리건*/ FROM SRBA_V_TONGJE_R WHERE BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_VALD_PNT IS NULL AND VALD_VALT_METH_C IN ('1','3')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A , (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.MNGR_JKW_NO = #{LOGIN_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 사용자ID AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A , (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYYY) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY != '9999') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.MNGR_JKW_NO = #{LOGIN_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 사용자ID AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))

SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT /*개선결재건*/ FROM ( SELECT A.BAS_YYMM , A.VALT_BRNO , NVL(G.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C , GYLJ_ID , GYLJ_ROLE_ID , IMPRV_BRNO FROM SRBA_V_REMDR_R A JOIN NIC41B E ON E.DPRT_CD = A.VALT_BRNO JOIN SRBA_DTL_C B ON B.DTL_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND B.GRP_C = 'R303' JOIN SRBA_DTL_C C ON C.DTL_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND C.GRP_C = 'R304' JOIN SRBA_DTL_C D ON D.DTL_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND D.GRP_C = 'R305' LEFT OUTER JOIN SRBA_IMPRV_M G ON G.BAS_YYMM = A.BAS_YYMM AND G.PROC_FLD_C = A.PROC_FLD_C AND G.PROC_LGDV_C = A.PROC_LGDV_C AND G.PROC_MDDV_C = A.PROC_MDDV_C AND G.PROC_SMDV_C = A.PROC_SMDV_C AND G.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND A.REMDR_RSK_GD_C = 'R' AND A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912') ) AA WHERE AA.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(BAS_YYMM) AS MAX_BAY_YYMM FROM SRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYMM != '999912')
AND AA.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','22') AND AA.VALT_BRNO NOT IN 'J5' /*준법 커스터마이징*/
AND AA.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.GYLJ_ID <> '0' AND AA.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 6
AND (AA.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 4 OR ( AA.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11') AND AA.VALT_BRNO = 'J5' )) /*준법 커스터마이징*/
AND AA.GYLJ_ID <> '0' AND AA.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 5

SELECT B.BAS_YYYY --기준년도 , B.RSK_MNG_ACT_C --위험관리 활동코드 , B.RSK_MNG_ACT_C||'. '||DTL.DTL_C_NM AS RSK_MNG_ACT_NM --상세코드명 R301 , B.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C --위험관리활동상세코드 , B.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C||'. '||DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_NM --상세코드명 R302 , DECODE(B.VALT_TRN, 0, '', B.VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN_DE --평가회차 , B.VALT_SDT --평가시작일자 , B.VALT_EDT --평가종료일자 , B.REAL_EDT --실제종료일자 , B.TGT_TRN_SDT --대상거래시작일자 , B.TGT_TRN_EDT --대상거래 종료일자 , B.VALT_TRN --평가회차 , A.SCHD_FIX_YN --일정확정여부 , A.VALT_TRN AS MASTER_VALT_TRN --총평가회차 , CASE WHEN VALT_EDT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND REAL_EDT IS NULL THEN '1' ELSE '2'END AS REDALERT --실제종료일자초과여부 1초과 2안정 FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M A, KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D B LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON B.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R301' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON B.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R302' WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY ORDER BY DECODE (RSK_MNG_ACT_C, 6, '99', LPAD(B.VALT_TRN, 2, '0'))||RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET VALT_SDT = #{VALT_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALT_EDT = #{VALT_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_SDT = #{TGT_TRN_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_EDT = #{TGT_TRN_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --회차 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = #{RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --상세코드

INSERT INTO KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D ( BAS_YYYY ,RSK_MNG_ACT_C ,RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C ,VALT_TRN ) (SELECT #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,B.DTL_C --위험관리활동 ,A.DTL_C --세부위험관리 활동 ,#{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM KRBA_DTL_C A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C B ON B.DTL_C = A.HGRK_DTL_C AND B.GRP_C ='R301' WHERE A.GRP_C ='R302' AND B.DTL_C IN ('4','5') )
UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경된 평가회차 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도
DELETE FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --회차
UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경된 평가회차 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET SCHD_FIX_YN = #{SCHD_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,SCHD_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,SCHD_FIX_JKW_NO = #{SCHD_FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도
UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C IN('1.1','1.2')
UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT = '' --null로 업데이트 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C IN('1.1','1.2')

INSERT INTO KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M (BAS_YYYY ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM ,RSK_INDCT_CTNT ,EXTR_TGT_YN ,EST_METH ,VB_DEFI_CTNT ,EXTR_BAS ,RUN_FRQ ,APR_UNIT_C ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,RSK_INDCT ,RSK_CATG ,RSK_FAC ,RSK_EVT ,RSK_LVL_C ,RSK_INDCT_NO ,RSK_INDCT_NM ,RSK_INDCT_CTNT ,EXTR_TGT_YN ,EST_METH ,VB_DEFI_CTNT ,EXTR_BAS ,RUN_FRQ ,APR_UNIT_C ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

INSERT INTO KRBA_RSK_INDICT_D (BAS_YYYY ,RSK_INDCT ,SRVC_G_C ,USYN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,RSK_INDCT ,SRVC_G_C ,USYN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM KRBA_RSK_INDICT_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

INSERT INTO KRBA_TJ_ACT_SVC_MP (BAS_YYYY ,TONGJE_ACT_ID ,SRVC_G_C ,USYN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,TONGJE_ACT_ID ,SRVC_G_C ,USYN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_SVC_MP WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
mapper.select: SELECT A.BAS_YYYY --기준년도 , A.VALT_TRN --평가회차 , A.ORG_LV1_C --위험관리활동상세코드 , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS LV1 --상세코드명 R306 , A.ORG_LV2_C --위험관리활동상세코드 , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS LV2 --상세코드명 R307 , A.BRNO --부점코드 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO,'') AS LV4 --부점명 , A.HGRK_BRNO --상위부점코드 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HGRK_BRNO,'') AS LV3 --상위부점명 FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON A.ORG_LV1_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R306' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON A.ORG_LV2_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R307' WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ORDER BY ORG_LV1_C, ORG_LV2_C

SELECT '' SELECTED , A.BAS_YYYY --기준년도 , A.VALT_TRN --평가회차 , A.ORG_LV1_C --위험관리활동상세코드 , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS LV1 --상세코드명 R306 , A.ORG_LV2_C --위험관리활동상세코드 , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS LV2 --상세코드명 R307 , A.BRNO --부점코드 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO,'') AS LV4 --부점명 , A.HGRK_BRNO --상위부점코드 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HGRK_BRNO,'') AS LV3 --상위부점명 FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON A.ORG_LV1_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R306' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON A.ORG_LV2_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R307' WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.ORG_LV1_C = #{R306CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.ORG_LV2_C = #{R307CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ORDER BY ORG_LV1_C, ORG_LV2_C

SELECT '' SELECTED ,A.DPRT_CD AS BRNO --부점코드 ,A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO --상위부점코드 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD,'') AS LV3 --상위부점명 ,A.DPRT_NM AS LV4 --부점명 FROM NIC41B A WHERE A.MOFC_BRN_CCD = 'B' AND A.DPRT_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND ORG_LV1_C = #{R306CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

DELETE FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.ORG_LV1_C = #{R306CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.ORG_LV2_C = #{R307CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

INSERT INTO KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_TRN ,BRNO ,ORG_LV1_C ,ORG_LV2_C ,HGRK_BRNO ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{R306CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{R307CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{HGRK_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

SELECT A.DPRT_CD AS BRNO --부점코드 ,A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO --상위부점코드 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD,'') AS LV3 --상위부점명 ,A.DPRT_NM AS LV4 --부점명 FROM NIC41B A WHERE A.MOFC_BRN_CCD = 'B' AND A.DPRT_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT BRNO FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY ,A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,A.FIX_YN ,CASE WHEN A.FIX_YN = '0' THEN '미확정' ELSE '확정' END AS FIX_YN_NM ,DTL.DTL_C_NM AS VALT_MDL_DTL_NM ,DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS VALT_MDL_NM ,(SELECT VALT_MDL_FIX_YN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VALT_FIX_YN FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R304' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON DTL.HGRK_DTL_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R303' WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ORDER BY A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET VALT_MDL_FIX_YN = #{VALT_MDL_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,VALT_MDL_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,VALT_MDL_FIX_JKW_NO = #{VALT_MDL_FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = #{RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 --('1.3')
UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT = '' --null로 업데이트 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = #{RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 --('1.3')
mapper.select: SELECT O_Z1,O_Z2,O_Z3,O_Z4,O_Z5 --전년도 산출가중치 , C_Z1,C_Z2,C_Z3,C_Z4,C_Z5 --당해년도 산출가중치 , NVL(F_Z1, '0') AS F_Z1 --당해년도 확정여부 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_Z1 --전년도 개인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_Z2 --전년도 법인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_Z3 --전년도 고위험 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_Z4 --전년도 중위험 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_Z5 --전년도 저위험 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1') AA --전년도 산출가중치 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_Z1 --전년도 개인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_Z2 --전년도 법인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_Z3 --전년도 고위험 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_Z4 --전년도 중위험 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '1.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_Z5 --전년도 저위험 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1') BB --당해 산출가중치 ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , FIX_YN AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1') CC --최종여부 ON BB.KEYV = CC.KEYV
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_VALT_MD_D A USING DUAL ON (A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MDL_WGT_DTL_V = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_V ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,'1.1' --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_MD_M SET FIX_YN = #{F_Z1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '1.1'
mapper.select: SELECT O_G1,O_G2,O_G3,O_G4,O_G5,O_G6 --전년도 목표 , O_R1,O_R2,O_R3,O_R4,O_R5,O_R6 --전년도 실제 , C_G1,C_G2,C_G3,C_G4,C_G5,C_G6 --당해년도 목표 , C_R1,C_R2,C_R3,C_R4,C_R5,C_R6 --당해년도 실제 , C_G1 - C_R1 AS C_D1 --당해년도 목표대비 내부통제 , C_G2 - C_R2 AS C_D2 --당해년도 목표대비 전사위험통제 , C_G3 - C_R3 AS C_D3 --당해년도 목표대비 고객확인의무 , C_G4 - C_R4 AS C_D4 --당해년도 목표대비 위험평가 모델 , C_G5 - C_R5 AS C_D5 --당해년도 목표대비 모니터링 및 보고관리 , C_G6 - C_R6 AS C_D6 --당해년도 목표대비 보안관리 목표 , O_I1,O_I2,O_I3,O_I4,O_I5,O_I6 --전년도 임계치 , C_I1,C_I2,C_I3,C_I4,C_I5,C_I6 --당해년도 임계치 , NVL(F_Z1, '0') AS F_Z1 -- 현재 확정여부 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G1 --전년도 내부통제 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G2 --전년도 전사위험통제 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G3 --전년도 고객확인의무 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G4 --전년도 위험평가 모델 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G5 --전년도 모니터링 및 보고관리 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.6') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_G6 --전년도 보안관리 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.7') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I1 --전년도 내부통제 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.8') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I2 --전년도 전사위험통제 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.9') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I3 --전년도 고객확인의무 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.10') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I4 --전년도 위험평가 모델 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.11') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I5 --전년도 모니터링 및 보고관리 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.12') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O_I6 --전년도 보안관리 임계치 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1') AA --전년도 목표 임계치 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G1 --당해 내부통제 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G2 --당해 전사위험통제 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G3 --당해 고객확인의무 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G4 --당해 위험평가 모델 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G5 --당해 모니터링 및 보고관리 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.6') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_G6 --당해 보안관리 목표 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.7') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I1 --당해 내부통제 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.8') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I2 --당해 전사위험통제 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.9') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I3 --당해 고객확인의무 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.10') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I4 --당해 위험평가 모델 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.11') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I5 --당해 모니터링 및 보고관리 임계치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.12') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C_I6 --당해 보안관리 임계치 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1') BB --당해 목표 임계치 ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '1') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R1 -- 전년도 내부통제 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '2') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R2 -- 전년도 전사위험통제 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '3') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R3 -- 전년도 고객확인의무 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '4') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R4 -- 전년도 위험평가 모델 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '5') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R5 -- 전년도 모니터링 및 보고관리 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS O_R6 -- 전년도 보안관리 실제 FROM (SELECT A.TONGJE_FLD_C , ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS EFF_RT FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 --최종회차 GROUP BY A.TONGJE_FLD_C ) ZZ ) CC -- 전년도 실제 ON BB.KEYV = CC.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '1') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R1 -- 당해 내부통제 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '2') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R2 -- 당해 전사위험통제 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '3') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R3 -- 당해 고객확인의무 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '4') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R4 -- 당해 위험평가 모델 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '5') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R5 -- 당해 모니터링 및 보고관리 실제 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6') THEN EFF_RT END), 0) AS C_R6 -- 당해 보안관리 실제 FROM (SELECT A.TONGJE_FLD_C , ROUND(AVG(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS EFF_RT FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A , (SELECT #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS C_YY , NVL(MAX(VALT_TRN),1) AS VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN < 99) DD WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = DD.C_YY AND A.VALT_TRN < = DD.VALT_TRN --평가회차 GROUP BY A.TONGJE_FLD_C ) ZZ ) DD --당해년도 실제 ON BB.KEYV = DD.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , FIX_YN AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1') EE --최종여부 ON BB.KEYV = EE.KEYV
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_VALT_MD_D A USING DUAL ON (A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MDL_WGT_DTL_V = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_V ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,'2.1' --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_MD_M SET FIX_YN = #{F_Z1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1'
mapper.select: SELECT #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS BAS_YYYY2 , O1_G1,O1_G2,O1_G3,O1_G4,O1_G5,O1_G6 --전년도 가중치 , C1_G1,C1_G2,C1_G3,C1_G4,C1_G5,C1_G6 --당해년도 가중치 , NVL(F_Z1, '0') AS F_Z1 -- 현재 확정여부 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G1 --전년도 내부통제 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G2 --전년도 전사위험통제 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G3 --전년도 고객확인의무 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G4 --전년도 위험평가 모델 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G5 --전년도 모니터링 및 보고관리 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.6') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O1_G6 --전년도 보안관리 가중치 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.2') AA --전년도 가중치 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G1 --당해 내부통제 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G2 --당해 전사위험통제 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G3 --당해 고객확인의무 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G4 --당해 위험평가 모델 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G5 --당해 모니터링 및 보고관리 가중치 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.2.6') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C1_G6 --당해 보안관리 가중치 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.2') BB --당해년도 가중치 ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , FIX_YN AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.2') EE --최종여부 ON BB.KEYV = EE.KEYV
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_VALT_MD_D A USING DUAL ON (A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.2' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MDL_WGT_DTL_V = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_V ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,'2.2' --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_MD_M SET FIX_YN = #{F_Z1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.2'
mapper.select: SELECT O3_R1,O3_R2,O3_R3,O3_R4,O3_R5 --전년도 구간기준 , O3_S1,O3_S2,O3_S3,O3_S4,O3_S5 --전년도 구간SCORE , O3_B1,O3_B2,O3_B3,O3_B4,O3_B5 --전년도 부점수 , C3_R1,C3_R2,C3_R3,C3_R4,C3_R5 --당해년도 구간비율 , C3_B1,C3_B2,C3_B3,C3_B4,C3_B5 --당해년도 부점수 , C3_G1,C3_G2,C3_G3,C3_G4,C3_G5 --당해년도 평가등급 , NVL(F_Z1, '0') AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O3_R1 --전년도 구간기준 R1 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O3_R2 --전년도 구간기준 R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O3_R3 --전년도 구간기준 R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O3_R4 --전년도 구간기준 R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS O3_R5 --전년도 구간기준 R5 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.1') AA --전년도 구간기준 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C3_R1 --당해 구간기준R1 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C3_R2 --당해 구간기준R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C3_R3 --당해 구간기준R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.4') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C3_R4 --당해 구간기준R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.5') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C3_R5 --당해 구간기준R5 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.6') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'1') AS C3_G1 --당해 평가등급R1 --코드 R332 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.7') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'1') AS C3_G2 --당해 평가등급R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.8') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'1') AS C3_G3 --당해 평가등급R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.9') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'1') AS C3_G4 --당해 평가등급R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.1.10') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'1') AS C3_G5 --당해 평가등급R5 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.1') BB --당해 구간기준/등급 ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '1') THEN R_SCOR END), 0) AS O3_S1 -- 전년도 SCORE R1--코드 R338 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '2') THEN R_SCOR END), 0) AS O3_S2 -- 전년도 SCORE R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '3') THEN R_SCOR END), 0) AS O3_S3 -- 전년도 SCORE R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '4') THEN R_SCOR END), 0) AS O3_S4 -- 전년도 SCORE R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '5') THEN R_SCOR END), 0) AS O3_S5 -- 전년도 SCORE R5 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '1') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS O3_B1 -- 전년도 부점수 R1 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '2') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS O3_B2 -- 전년도 부점수 R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '3') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS O3_B3 -- 전년도 부점수 R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '4') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS O3_B4 -- 전년도 부점수 R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '5') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS O3_B5 -- 전년도 부점수 R5 FROM (SELECT A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C , ROUND(AVG(B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR),2) AS R_SCOR , COUNT(A.BRNO) AS BRNO_CNT --전년도 부점수 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A JOIN KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE A.VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C ) ZZ ) CC ON BB.KEYV = CC.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '1') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS C3_B1 -- 당해 부점수 R1 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '2') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS C3_B2 -- 당해 부점수 R2 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '3') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS C3_B3 -- 당해 부점수 R3 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '4') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS C3_B4 -- 당해 부점수 R4 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (ZZ.MLTF_RSK_GD_C = '5') THEN BRNO_CNT END), 0) AS C3_B5 -- 당해 부점수 R5 FROM (SELECT A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C , ROUND(AVG(B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR),2) AS R_SCOR , COUNT(DISTINCT A.BRNO) AS BRNO_CNT --당해년도 부점수 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A JOIN KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN < 99 GROUP BY A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C ) ZZ ) DD ON BB.KEYV = DD.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , FIX_YN AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.1') EE --최종여부 ON BB.KEYV = EE.KEYV
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_VALT_MD_D A USING DUAL ON (A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.1' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MDL_WGT_DTL_V = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_V ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,'3.1' --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_MD_M SET FIX_YN = #{F_Z1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.1'
mapper.select: SELECT O4_I2 || ' ~ ' || O4_I1 AS O4_I1 , O4_I3 || ' ~ ' || O4_I2 AS O4_I2 , '1 ~ ' || O4_I3 AS O4_I3 --전년도 산출가중치 , C4_I1,C4_I2,C4_I3 --당해년도 산출가중치 , NVL(F_Z1, '0') AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'100') AS O4_I1 --전년도 Green , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'15') AS O4_I2 --전년도 Yellow , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'5') AS O4_I3 --전년도 Red FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{LAST_BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.2') AA --전년도 산출가중치 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.1') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C4_I1 --전년도 개인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.2') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C4_I2 --전년도 법인 , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '3.2.3') THEN MDL_WGT_DTL_V END),'0') AS C4_I3 --전년도 고위험 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.2') BB --당해 산출가중치 ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , FIX_YN AS F_Z1 --확정여부 FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_M A WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.2') EE --최종여부 ON BB.KEYV = EE.KEYV
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_VALT_MD_D A USING DUAL ON (A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MDL_WGT_DTL_C = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.2' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MDL_WGT_DTL_V = #{MDL_WGT_DTL_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYYY ,VALT_MDL_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_C ,MDL_WGT_DTL_V ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,'3.2' --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{MDL_WGT_DTL_V, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_MD_M SET FIX_YN = #{F_Z1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '3.2'
mapper.select: SELECT BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , EXP_FIX_YN AS SCHD_FIX_YN /* 사례확정여부 */ FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M /* RBA 위험평가 일정 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M SET EXP_FIX_YN = #{SCHD_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 ,EXP_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 ,EXP_FIX_JKW_NO = #{SCHD_FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도

UPDATE KRBA_ML_EXP_I /* RBA 자금세탁사례조회 */ SET SRC_TP_C = #{SRC_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 출처유형코드 */ , SRC_DTL_INFO = #{SRC_DTL_INFO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 출처상세정보 */ , ML_EXP_TITE = #{ML_EXP_TITE ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 자금세탁사례제목 */ , ML_EXP_CTNT = #{ML_EXP_CTNT ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 자금세탁사례내용 */ , RSK_CAUS_CTNT = #{RSK_CAUS_CTNT ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 위험원인내용 */ , REL_NAT_NM = #{REL_NAT_NM ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련국가명 */ , REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C = #{REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련국가위험유형코드 */ , CUST_DWL_TP_C = #{CUST_DWL_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객주거유형코드 */ , CUST_ASS_SCAL_C = #{CUST_ASS_SCAL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객자산규모코드 */ , CUST_OCP_G_C = #{CUST_OCP_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객직업구분코드 */ , CUST_UPSL_G_C = #{CUST_UPSL_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객업종구분코드 */ , CUST_INDV_PCUL_C = #{CUST_INDV_PCUL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객개인특성코드 */ , CUST_CORP_PCUL_C = #{CUST_CORP_PCUL_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객법인특성코드 */ , CUST_RELR_TP_C = #{CUST_RELR_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 고객관련자유형코드 */ , PROD_LN_C = #{PROD_LN_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품여신코드 */ , PROD_INSU_C = #{PROD_INSU_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품보험코드 */ , PROD_INV_C = #{PROD_INV_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품투자코드 */ , PROD_RDAMT_G_C = #{PROD_RDAMT_G_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품입출금구분코드 */ , PROD_TRN_SCAL = #{PROD_TRN_SCAL ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품거래규모 */ , PROD_TRN_PCUL_C = #{PROD_TRN_PCUL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 상품거래특성코드 */ , ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C = #{ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 가입채널보험코드 */ , ENTR_CHNL_LN_C = #{ENTR_CHNL_LN_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 가입채널여신코드 */ , PAY_CHNL_C = #{PAY_CHNL_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 납입채널코드 */ , REL_F_CRIM_C = #{REL_F_CRIM_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련전제범죄코드 */ , REL_FNCO_C = #{REL_FNCO_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련금융회사코드 */ , SSPS_TRN_TP_C = #{SSPS_TRN_TP_C ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 의심거래유형코드 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 기준년도 */ AND SNO = #{SNO ,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 순번 */
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_30_02_02_01_selectExpsi */ ROUND(AVG(T) * 0.5) M_RSK_CNT , ROUND(AVG(T)) H_RSK_CNT FROM (SELECT AVG(T1) T FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C) T1 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE RSK_CATG = '1' AND EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T2) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_DWL_TP_C) T2 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_DWL_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T3) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_ASS_SCAL_C) T3 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T4) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_OCP_G_C) T4 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_OCP_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T5) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_UPSL_G_C) T5 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '04' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_UPSL_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T6) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_INDV_PCUL_C) T6 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '05') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T7) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(CUST_CORP_PCUL_C) T7 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '06') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T8) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(PROD_TRN_PCUL_C) T8 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '3' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T9) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C) T9 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T10) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_LN_C) T10 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_LN_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M UNION ALL SELECT AVG(T11) FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT , COUNT(PAY_CHNL_C) T11 FROM (SELECT RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PAY_CHNL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_EVT ) M ) M WHERE 1=1

SELECT BAS_YYYY , RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , EXPS_CNT , EXPS_GD_C , J_VALT_GD_C , (CASE WHEN J_VALT_GD_C = '1' THEN '1' WHEN J_VALT_GD_C = '2' THEN CASE WHEN EXPS_GD_C = '3' THEN '3' ELSE '2' END ELSE '3' END) RSK_LVL_C FROM (SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , M.RSK_CATG , M.RSK_FAC , M.RSK_EVT , EXPS_CNT , (CASE WHEN EXPS_CNT >= H_RSK_CNT THEN '3' WHEN EXPS_CNT >= M_RSK_CNT THEN '2' ELSE '1' END) EXPS_GD_C , J_VALT_GD_C FROM (SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C) EXPS_CNT FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '1' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.REL_NAT_RSK_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_DWL_TP_C) T2 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_DWL_TP_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C) T3 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_ASS_SCAL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_OCP_G_C) T4 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC,RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_OCP_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_UPSL_G_C) T5 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '04') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_UPSL_G_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C) T6 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '05') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_INDV_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C) T7 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '2' AND RSK_FAC = '06') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.CUST_CORP_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C) T8 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '3' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PROD_TRN_PCUL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_CATG , A.RSK_FAC , A.RSK_EVT , COUNT(B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C) T9 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '01') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_INSU_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , COUNT(ENTR_CHNL_LN_C) T10 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '02') A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.ENTR_CHNL_LN_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT UNION ALL SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , COUNT(PAY_CHNL_C) T11 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_I WHERE EXPS_CNT_EXTR_YN = 1 AND RSK_CATG = '4' AND RSK_FAC = '03') A JOIN KRBA_ML_EXP_I B ON A.RSK_EVT = B.PAY_CHNL_C WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_FAC, A.RSK_EVT ) M JOIN (SELECT M.BAS_YYYY , RSK_CATG , RSK_FAC , RSK_EVT , J_VALT_GD_C , H_RSK_CNT , M_RSK_CNT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_M M JOIN KRBA_EXPS_I A ON M.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY WHERE M.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A ON M.RSK_CATG = A.RSK_CATG AND M.RSK_FAC = A.RSK_FAC AND M.RSK_EVT = A.RSK_EVT WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY RSK_CATG, RSK_FAC,RSK_EVT ) M WHERE 1=1

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , GRP_C_NM /* 그룹코드명 */ , NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , GRP_B_C /* 그룹분류코드 1:RBA 2:System */ , CON_YN /* 수정여부 */ , TMP01 /* TEMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TEMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM KRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_B_C LIKE #{CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' AND (GRP_C LIKE #{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' OR GRP_C_NM LIKE '%'||#{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%') ORDER BY GRP_C

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM KRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /* 상위그룹코드명 */ , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM /* 상위상세코드명 */ , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME , 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM KRBA_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO
mapper.update: INSERT INTO KRBA_GRP_C ( GRP_C ,GRP_C_NM ,GRP_B_C ,CON_YN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{GRP_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{GRP_B_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{CON_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HHMISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

INSERT INTO KRBA_DTL_C ( GRP_C ,DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,USYN ,SNO ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HHMISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

UPDATE KRBA_DTL_C SET DTL_C_NM = #{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USYN = #{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HHMISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM KRBA_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_30_01_05_01_getSearch1 */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , A.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , A.BRNO AS OBRNO /* 대상지점 */ , C.DPRT_NM AS OBRNO_NM /* 대상지점명 */ , B.ING_STEP AS ING_STEP /* 진행단계 */ , CASE WHEN A.VALT_TRN = B.ING_TRN THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS COMP_VALT_ING_TRN /* 평가진행회차비교 */ FROM KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I A /* RBA 노출위험 SCORE */ JOIN KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M B /* RBA 위험평가 일정 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C /* AML부점_NIC41B */ ON A.BRNO = C.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY C.DPRT_NM

SELECT B.BAS_YYYY , B.VALT_TRN , B.BRNO AS OBRNO , A.DPRT_NM AS OBRNO_NM , C.DPRT_CD AS RBRNO , C.DPRT_NM AS RBRNO_NM FROM NIC41B A JOIN KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I B ON A.DPRT_CD = B.BRNO JOIN NIC41B C ON A.DPRT_CD <> C.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY C.DPRT_NM

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , A.VALT_TRN , A.OBRNO , B.DPRT_NM AS OBRNO_NM , A.RBRNO , C.DPRT_NM AS RBRNO_NM FROM KRBA_EXPS_BRNO_I A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B B ON A.OBRNO = B.DPRT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C ON A.RBRNO = C.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY B.DPRT_NM, C.DPRT_NM

/*01 사망보험 02 생존보험 03 생사혼합 04 변액보험 05 단체보험 06 기업형 퇴직연금 07 개인형 퇴직연금 08 약관대출 09 신용대출 10 담보대출 11 PF대출 12 수익증권 */ SELECT FIRST /* 해더 */ , HGRK_BRNO_NM AS LV1 /* 조직체계 LV1 */ , BRNO_NM AS LV2 /* 조직체계 LV2 */ , SRVC01 /* 보험 사망보험 */ , SRVC02 /* 보험 생존보험 */ , SRVC03 /* 보험 생사보험 */ , SRVC04 /* 보험 변액보험 */ , SRVC05 /* 보험 단체보험 */ , SRVC06 /* 퇴직연금 기업형 */ , SRVC07 /* 퇴직연금 개인형 */ , SRVC08 /* 대출 약관대출 */ , SRVC09 /* 대출 신용대출 */ , SRVC10 /* 대출 담보대출 */ , SRVC11 /* 대출 PF대출 */ , SRVC12 /* 수익증권 */ , LINKYN /* 링크여부 */ FROM (SELECT '1' AS FIRST , AA.HGRK_BRNO , AA.HGRK_BRNO_NM , AA.BRNO , AA.BRNO_NM , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC01 --사망보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC02 --생존보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC03 --생사혼합 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC04 --변액보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC05 --단체보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC06 --기업형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC07 --개인형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC08 --약관대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC09 --신용대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC10 --담보대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC11 --PF대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC12 --수익증권 , 0 AS LINKYN --링크여부 FROM (SELECT B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, '') AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.BRNO AS BRNO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM , A.SRVC_G_C , A.REMDR_RSK_AMT FROM KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} ) AA GROUP BY HGRK_BRNO, HGRK_BRNO_NM, AA.BRNO, AA.BRNO_NM UNION ALL SELECT '99' AS FIRST , '' AS HGRK_BRNO , '합계' AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , '' AS BRNO , '' AS BRNO_NM , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC01 --사망보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC02 --생존보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC03 --생사혼합 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC04 --변액보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC05 --단체보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC06 --기업형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC07 --개인형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC08 --약관대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC09 --신용대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC10 --담보대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC11 --PF대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN AA.REMDR_RSK_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC12 --수익증권 , 1 AS LINKYN --링크여부 FROM (SELECT A.SRVC_G_C , A.REMDR_RSK_AMT FROM KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I A WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} ) AA WHERE 1=1 ) BB WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY BB.FIRST, BB.HGRK_BRNO_NM, BB.BRNO_NM

SELECT DTL_C , DTL_C_NM , NVL(TRN_ATM, 0) AS TRN_ATM -- 위험거래금액 , NVL(TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 통제효과성 , NVL(REMDR_RSK_AMT, 0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 잔여위험 FROM (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R333' ) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.SRVC_G_C ,ROUND(SUM(A.LST_TOT_V/1000000),0) AS TRN_ATM -- 위험거래금액 ,ROUND(SUM(B.REMDR_RSK_AMT/1000000),0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 잔여위험 ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 통합 FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B, KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I C WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = B.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = C.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM GROUP BY A.SRVC_G_C ) BB ON AA.DTL_C = BB.SRVC_G_C ORDER BY DTL_C

SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(MLTF_RSK_SCOR),4),0) AS MLTF_RSK_SCOR FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(REMDR_RSK_SCOR),4),0) AS REMDR_RSK_SCOR FROM KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , A.VALT_TRN , A.BRNO , A.SRVC_G_C , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM -- 부점명 , SUM(A.LST_TOT_V) AS TRN_ATM -- 위험거래금액 , ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 통제효과성 통합 , SUM(B.REMDR_RSK_AMT) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 잔여위험 FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I A JOIN KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = B.SRVC_G_C JOIN KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = C.SRVC_G_C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.SRVC_G_C = #{SRVC_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY, A.VALT_TRN, A.BRNO, A.SRVC_G_C

SELECT A.BRNO --부점 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM , A.TONGJE_FLD_C --AML업무영역 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_NM --AML업무영역 , SUM((SELECT ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 WHERE BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN AND SRVC_G_C = A.SRVC_G_C AND BRNO IN (SELECT DISTINCT OPR_VALT_BRNO FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND OPR_VALT_BRNO != '9999' ) AND TONGJE_EFF_RT = A.TONGJE_EFF_RT )) AS OFF_BRNO_RT --전사 , ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS BRNO_RT --부점 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.SRVC_G_C = #{SRVC_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.BRNO = #{BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM GROUP BY A.BRNO, A.TONGJE_FLD_C ORDER BY A.TONGJE_FLD_C

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY -- 기준년도 , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID -- 통제운영평가 ID , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID -- 통제활동 ID , A.CH_ID -- 취약점 ID , A.TONGJE_FLD_C -- 통제영역코드 , A.TONGJE_PROC_C -- 통제프로세스코드 , D.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM -- 통제프로세스명 , A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C -- 통제서브프로세스 코드 , E.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_NM -- 통제서브프로세스명 , C.CH_CTNT -- 취약성 설명(Description) , TO_CHAR(NVL(C.CH_GD,0)) AS CH_GD -- 취약성 위험등급 , B.TONGJE_ACT_TITE -- CONTROL 정의 , TO_CHAR(NVL(B.DSGN_VALD_RT,0)) AS DSGN_VALD_RT -- 설계유효성 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.OPR_EFF_RT,0)) AS OPR_EFF_RT -- 운영효과성 , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0)) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 통제효과성 , ROUND(NVL(C.CH_GD,0) * (100 - NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0)) / 100, 2) AS REMDR_V --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' -- 보안 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C D ON A.TONGJE_PROC_C = D.DTL_C AND D.GRP_C = 'R309' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C E ON A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = E.DTL_C AND E.GRP_C = 'R310' WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND A.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
AND A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
ORDER BY TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID

SELECT AA.CNT ,AA.BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', AA.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R338' AND DTL_C = AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C), AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C) AS MLTF_RSK_GD --위험등급 ,AA.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 ,ROUND(AA.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 1) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 ,ROUND(AA.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 1)||'%' AS TONGJE_EFF_RT_NM --통제효과성 ,AA.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR DESC, C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR DESC) AS CNT ,A.BRNO ,A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C --위험등급 ,C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 ,(SELECT AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT) FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN AND BRNO = A.BRNO ) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT ,B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B, KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I C
WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN ORDER BY B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR DESC, C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR DESC ) AA WHERE CNT <= #{BRANCH_COUNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_doSearch2 */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_3_1 /* 통제활동 설계 평가 실제종료일자 */ , B.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_3_2 /* 통제활동 설계 취약점 개선 실제종료일자 */ , (SELECT COUNT(BAS_YYYY) FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I C /* RBA 노출위험 최종결과 */ WHERE C.BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY) AS EXPS_CNT /* 노출위험 최종결과 등록건수 */ FROM (SELECT D.BAS_YYYY , D.REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D D /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND D.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '3' /* R301 3 : 통제활동 설계 유효성 평가 */ AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.1' /* R302 3.1 : 통제활동 설계 평가 */ AND D.VALT_TRN = 0) A JOIN (SELECT E.BAS_YYYY , E.REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D E /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND E.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '3' /* R301 3 : 통제활동 설계 유효성 평가 */ AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.2' /* R302 3.2 : 통제활동 설계 취약점 개선 */ AND E.VALT_TRN = 0) B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_doDecideOrCancel */ KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ SET A.FIX_YN = #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 확정여부 */ , A.FIX_DT = #{FIX_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 확정일자 */ , A.FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 확정자직원번호 */ , A.CHG_DT = #{CHG_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = #{CHG_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자번호 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_checkFixN */ A.BAS_YYYY , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.FIX_YN = 0

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_confirmDsgnValtRealEdt */ MAX(A.REAL_EDT) AS REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D A /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ((A.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '2' AND A.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '2.4') OR (A.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '3' AND A.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.1')) AND A.VALT_TRN = 0 AND A.REAL_EDT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY
SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_NIC41B */ A.DPRT_NM /* 부점코드 */ , A.DPRT_CD /* 부점명 */ FROM NIC41B A /* AML부점_NIC41B */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY A.DPRT_CD

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_01_KRBA_DTL_C */ A.DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , A.DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ FROM KRBA_DTL_C A /* RBA 상세코드 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USYN = 1 ORDER BY A.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , B.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C /* 취약점원인코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320' AND DTL_C = B.CH_CAUS_C) AS CH_CAUS_C_NM /* 취약점원인코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R321' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV1_C) AS CH_TP_LV1_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV1코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R322' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV2_C) AS CH_TP_LV2_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV2코드명 */ , B.EFCT_GD AS EFCT_GD /* 영향도등급 */ , B.OCC_POSS_GD AS OCC_POSS_GD /* 발생가능성등급 */ , B.CH_GD AS CH_GD /* 취약성등급 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM AS BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM /* 업무규정관련항목 */ , A.REL_DATA_CTNT AS REL_DATA_CTNT /* 관련자료내용 */ , A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C /* 통제적용범위코드 */ , A.TONGJE_TP_C AS TONGJE_TP_C /* 통제유형코드 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , C.VALT_TP_C AS VALT_TP_C /* 평가유형코드 */ , C.VALT_METH_CTNT AS VALT_METH_CTNT /* 평가방법내용 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT AS OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT /* 운영평가가준내용 */ , C.VALT_FRQ_C AS VALT_FRQ_C /* 평가주기코드 */ , C.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , C.OPR_VALT_TP_C AS OPR_VALT_TP_C /* 운영평가TYPE코드 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BRNO AS OPR_VALT_BRNO /* 운영평가부점번호 */ , C.TEST_STEP_CTNT AS TEST_STEP_CTNT /* 테스트절차내용 */ , C.TEST_PROF_CTNT AS TEST_PROF_CTNT /* 테스트증빙내용 */ , C.GOAL_V_CTNT AS GOAL_V_CTNT /* 목표값내용 */ , C.SMPL_YN AS SMPL_YN /* 샘플링여부 */ , C.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID AS KOFIU_JIPYO_ID /* KoFIU지표ID */ , A.USYN AS USYN /* 사용여부 */ , A.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN /* 확정여부 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자명 */ , CASE WHEN A.CHG_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.CHG_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 1, 4) ||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 5, 2) ||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 7, 2)||' '|| SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 1, 2)||':'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 3, 2)||':'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 5, 2) ELSE '' END AS CHG_DY_TM /* 변경일시 */ --for Oracle --, CASE WHEN A.CHG_DT IS NOT NULL -- AND A.CHG_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.CHG_DT||A.CHG_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -- ELSE '' -- END AS CHG_DY_TM , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ , A.AIM_STTP_RT AS AIM_STTP_RT /* 목적적합성비율 */ , A.OPR_POSS_RT AS OPR_POSS_RT /* 운영가능성비율 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M C /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doSearchChInfo */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , A.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , A.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C /* 취약점원인코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320' AND DTL_C = A.CH_CAUS_C) AS CH_CAUS_C_NM /* 취약점원인코드명 */ , A.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R321' AND DTL_C = A.CH_TP_LV1_C) AS CH_TP_LV1_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV1코드명 */ , A.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R322' AND DTL_C = A.CH_TP_LV2_C) AS CH_TP_LV2_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV2코드명 */ , A.EFCT_GD AS EFCT_GD /* 영향도등급 */ , A.OCC_POSS_GD AS OCC_POSS_GD /* 발생가능성등급 */ , A.CH_GD AS CH_GD /* 취약성등급 */ FROM KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_getTONGJE_ACT_OPR_VALT_IDs */ CH_ID||'_C'||CAST(MAX(CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), '0') AS INTEGER)) + 1 AS VARCHAR2(2)) AS TONGJE_ACT_ID , CH_ID||'_C'||CAST(MAX(CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), '0') AS INTEGER)) + 1 AS VARCHAR2(2))||'_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID -- for Oracle -- CH_ID||'_C'||TO_CHAR(MAX(NVL(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), 0)) + 1) AS TONGJE_ACT_ID --, CH_ID||'_C'||TO_CHAR(MAX(NVL(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), 0)) + 1)||'_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID -- for DB2 -- CH_ID||'_C'||CAST(MAX(INTEGER(COALESCE(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), '0'))) + 1 AS VARCHAR2(2)) AS TONGJE_ACT_ID --, CH_ID||'_C'||CAST(MAX(INTEGER(COALESCE(SUBSTR(TONGJE_ACT_ID, (LENGTH(CH_ID) + 3), 2), '0'))) + 1 AS VARCHAR2(2))||'_T1' AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M /* RBA 통제활동 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY, CH_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doSave_KRBA_TJ_ACT_M */ KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ SET A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE = #{TONGJE_ACT_TITE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL = #{TONGJE_ACT_DTL, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM = #{BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 업무규정관련항목 */ , A.REL_DATA_CTNT = #{REL_DATA_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 관련자료내용 */ , A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C = #{TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 통제적용범위코드 */ , A.TONGJE_TP_C = #{TONGJE_TP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 통제유형코드 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , A.USYN = #{USYN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 사용여부 */ , A.DSGN_VALD_RT = #{DSGN_VALD_RT, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 설계유효성비율 */ , A.AIM_STTP_RT = #{AIM_STTP_RT, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 목적적합성비율 */ , A.OPR_POSS_RT = #{OPR_POSS_RT, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 운영가능성비율 */ , A.CHG_DT = #{CHG_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = #{CHG_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자번호 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doSave_KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M */ KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M A /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ SET A.VALT_TP_C = #{VALT_TP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 평가유형코드 */ , A.VALT_METH_CTNT = #{VALT_METH_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 평가방법내용 */ , A.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT = #{OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 운영평가기준내용 */ , A.VALT_FRQ_C = #{VALT_FRQ_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 평가주기코드 */ , A.GOAL_V_CTNT = #{GOAL_V_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 목표값내용 */ , A.SMPL_YN = #{SMPL_YN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 샘플링여부 */ , A.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID = #{KOFIU_JIPYO_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* KoFIU지표ID */ , A.NOTE_CTNT = #{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 비고내용 */ , A.OPR_VALT_TP_C = #{OPR_VALT_TP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 운영평가TYPE코드 */ , A.OPR_VALT_BRNO = #{OPR_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 운영평가부점번호 */ , A.TEST_STEP_CTNT = #{TEST_STEP_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 테스트절차내용 */ , A.TEST_PROF_CTNT = #{TEST_PROF_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 테스트증빙내용 */ , A.CHG_DT = #{CHG_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = #{CHG_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자번호 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doDelete_KRBA_TJ_ACT_M */ KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ SET A.USYN = 0 /* 사용여부 */ , A.CHG_DT = #{CHG_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = #{CHG_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자번호 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_02_doDelete_KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M */ KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M A /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ SET A.VALT_TP_C = '' /* 평가유형코드 */ , A.VALT_METH_CTNT = '' /* 평가방법내용 */ , A.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT = '' /* 운영평가기준내용 */ , A.VALT_FRQ_C = '' /* 평가주기코드 */ , A.GOAL_V_CTNT = '' /* 목표값내용 */ , A.SMPL_YN = 0 /* 샘플링여부 */ , A.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID = '' /* KoFIU지표ID */ , A.CHG_DT = #{CHG_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = #{CHG_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자번호 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_03_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , B.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C /* 취약점원인코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320' AND DTL_C = B.CH_CAUS_C) AS CH_CAUS_C_NM /* 취약점원인코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R321' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV1_C) AS CH_TP_LV1_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV1코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R322' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV2_C) AS CH_TP_LV2_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV2코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C /* 통제적용범위코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R324' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C) AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C_NM /* 통제적용범위코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_TP_C AS TONGJE_TP_C /* 통제유형코드 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO) AS DSGN_VALT_BR_NM /* 설계평가부점명 */ , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ , A.AIM_STTP_RT AS AIM_STTP_RT /* 목적적합성비율 */ , A.OPR_POSS_RT AS OPR_POSS_RT /* 운영가능성비율 */ , C.DSGN_CH_ID AS DSGN_CH_ID /* 설계취약점ID */ , C.DSGN_CH_TITE AS DSGN_CH_TITE /* 설계취약점제목 */ , C.ISSU_DTL_CTNT AS ISSU_DTL_CTNT /* 이슈상세내역 */ , C.IMPRV_TP_C AS IMPRV_TP_C /* 개선유형코드 */ , C.LSTR_G_C AS LSTR_G_C /* 장단기구분코드 */ , C.IMPRV_GOAL_DT AS IMPRV_GOAL_DT /* 개선목표일자 */ , C.IMPRV_BRNO AS IMPRV_BRNO /* 개선부점번호 */ , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.IMPRV_BRNO) AS IMPRV_BR_NM /* 개선부점명 */ , C.IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO AS IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO /* 개선이행담당자번호 */ , C.TOBE_TONGJE_ACT AS TOBE_TONGJE_ACT /* TOBE통제활동 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_CH_I C /* RBA 통제활동 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_03_insertKRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I */ INTO KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I /* RBA 통제활동 개선조치 */ ( BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 첨부파일번호 */ , FIX_YN /* 확정여부 */ , GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태코드 */ , GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ ) VALUES ( #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0 , 0 , '0' , 0 , #{DR_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{DR_TIME, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_07_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , C.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , C.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.TEST_STEP_CTNT AS TEST_STEP_CTNT /* 테스트절차내용 */ , A.TEST_PROF_CTNT AS TEST_PROF_CTNT /* 테스트증빙내용 */ , A.OPR_VALT_TP_C AS OPR_VALT_TP_C /* 운영평가TYPE코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R328' AND DTL_C = A.OPR_VALT_TP_C) AS OPR_VALT_TP_C_NM /* 운영평가TYPE코드명 */ , CASE WHEN A.SMPL_YN = 1 THEN 'Y' WHEN A.SMPL_YN = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE '' END AS SMPL_YN /* 샘플링여부 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M A /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M C /* RBA 통제활동 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_01_07_doSearchTemplate */ '' AS SELECTED , A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , A.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM AS DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_getGyljSer */ COALESCE(MAX(GYLJ_SER), 0) + 1 AS MAX_GYLJ_SER -- for Oracle -- NVL(MAX(GYLJ_SER), 0) + 1 AS MAX_GYLJ_SER FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_02_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS
