TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , B.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C /* 취약점원인코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320' AND DTL_C = B.CH_CAUS_C) AS CH_CAUS_C_NM /* 취약점원인코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R321' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV1_C) AS CH_TP_LV1_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV1코드명 */ , B.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R322' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV2_C) AS CH_TP_LV2_C_NM /* 취약점유형LV2코드명 */ , B.EFCT_GD AS EFCT_GD /* 영향도등급 */ , B.OCC_POSS_GD AS OCC_POSS_GD /* 발생가능성등급 */ , B.CH_GD AS CH_GD /* 취약성등급 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM AS BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM /* 업무규정관련항목 */ , A.REL_DATA_CTNT AS REL_DATA_CTNT /* 관련자료내용 */ , A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C /* 통제적용범위코드 */ , A.TONGJE_TP_C AS TONGJE_TP_C /* 통제유형코드 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , C.VALT_TP_C AS VALT_TP_C /* 평가유형코드 */ , C.VALT_METH_CTNT AS VALT_METH_CTNT /* 평가방법내용 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT AS OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT /* 운영평가가준내용 */ , C.VALT_FRQ_C AS VALT_FRQ_C /* 평가주기코드 */ , C.GOAL_V_CTNT AS GOAL_V_CTNT /* 목표값내용 */ , C.SMPL_YN AS SMPL_YN /* 샘플링여부 */ , C.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID AS KOFIU_JIPYO_ID /* KoFIU지표ID */ , A.USYN AS USYN /* 사용여부 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자명 */ , CASE WHEN A.CHG_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.CHG_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 1, 4) ||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 5, 2) ||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_DT, 7, 2)||' '|| SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 1, 2)||':'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 3, 2)||':'||SUBSTR(A.CHG_TIME, 5, 2) ELSE '' END AS CHG_DY_TM /* 변경일시 */ --for Oracle --, CASE WHEN A.CHG_DT IS NOT NULL -- AND A.CHG_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.CHG_DT||A.CHG_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -- ELSE '' -- END AS CHG_DY_TM , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ , A.AIM_STTP_RT AS AIM_STTP_RT /* 목적적합성비율 */ , A.OPR_POSS_RT AS OPR_POSS_RT /* 운영가능성비율 */ , D.MNGR_JKW_NO AS MNGR_JKW_NO /* 담당자직원번호 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M C /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M D /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ ON C.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = D.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND D.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , A.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , A.GYLJ_S_C AS GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태코드명 */ , CASE WHEN GYLJ_S_C IN ('12', '3') AND GYLJ_ID = 0 THEN (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.FIX_JKW_NO) ELSE (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) END AS REQ_JKW_NM /* 요청조작자명 */ , A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_getGyljId */ KRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL --for DB2 --SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_getGyljId */ -- (NEXTVAL FOR KRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ) AS MAX_GYLJ_ID -- FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_getGyljSer */ COALESCE(MAX(GYLJ_SER), 0) + 1 AS MAX_GYLJ_SER -- for Oracle -- NVL(MAX(GYLJ_SER), 0) + 1 AS MAX_GYLJ_SER FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_03_getValtCntEdt */ H.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , H.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , H.CNT_BY_WHL_VALT AS CNT_BY_WHL_VALT /* 전사평가건수 */ , H.CNT_BY_BR_VALT AS CNT_BY_BR_VALT /* 부점평가건수 */ , H.CNT_BY_6_VALT AS CNT_BY_6_VALT /* 보안평가건수 */ , I.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_1 /* 부점별 평가 실제종료일 */ , J.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_2 /* 전사 위험평가 실제종료일 */ , K.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_3 /* 보안 위험평가 실제종료일 */ , L.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_4_1 /* 운영 평가 실제종료일 */ FROM (SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , A.VALT_TRN , SUM(CASE WHEN B.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C = '1' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_WHL_VALT , SUM(CASE WHEN B.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C = '2' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_BR_VALT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_6_VALT FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B /* RBA 통제활동 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID AND B.USYN = 1 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY, A.VALT_TRN) H JOIN (SELECT D.BAS_YYYY , D.REAL_EDT , D.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D D /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND D.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.1') I ON H.BAS_YYYY = I.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = I.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT E.BAS_YYYY , E.REAL_EDT , E.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D E /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND E.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.2') J ON H.BAS_YYYY = J.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = J.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT F.REAL_EDT , F.BAS_YYYY , F.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D F /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND F.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.3') K ON H.BAS_YYYY = K.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = K.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT G.REAL_EDT , G.BAS_YYYY , G.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D G /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND G.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND G.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND G.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '4' AND G.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '4.1') L ON H.BAS_YYYY = L.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = L.VALT_TRN WHERE 1=1 AND H.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_04_doSearch */ A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D JOIN NIC41B E ON D.DEP_ID = E.DPRT_CD WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , A.DR_DT||A.DR_TIME AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_10_doSearchInfo */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , D.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , D.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM AS BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM /* 업무규정관련항목 */ , C.TEST_STEP_CTNT AS TEST_STEP_CTNT /* 테스트절차내용 */ , C.TEST_PROF_CTNT AS TEST_PROF_CTNT /* 테스트증빙내용 */ , C.TJ_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS TJ_ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 통제첨부파일 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R324' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C) AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C_NM /* 통제적용범위코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_TP_C) AS TONGJE_TP_C_NM /* 통제유형코드명 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R326' AND DTL_C = C.VALT_TP_C) AS VALT_TP_C_NM /* 평가유형코드명 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BRNO AS OPR_VALT_BRNO /* 운영평가부점번호 */ , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC41B X , NIC92B Y WHERE C.OPR_VALT_BRNO = X.DPRT_CD AND X.MOFC_BRN_CCD = Y.CNTNT AND Y.CD = 'M043') AS VALT_MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 평가본사지점구분코드명 */ , C.VALT_METH_CTNT AS VALT_METH_CTNT /* 평가방법내용 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT AS OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT /* 운영평가가준내용 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R327' AND DTL_C = C.VALT_FRQ_C) AS VALT_FRQ_C_NM /* 평가주기코드 */ , C.GOAL_V_CTNT AS GOAL_V_CTNT /* 목표값내용 */ , C.SMPL_YN AS SMPL_YN /* 샘플링여부 */ , C.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID AS KOFIU_JIPYO_ID /* KoFIU지표ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R328' AND DTL_C = C.OPR_VALT_TP_C) AS OPR_VALT_TP_C_NM /* 운영평가TYPE코드명 */ , C.TEST_TMP_FILE_NM AS TEST_TMP_FILE_NM /* 테스트템플릿파일명 */ , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ , D.OPR_EFF_RT AS OPR_EFF_RT /* 운영효과성비율 */ , D.TP_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS TP_ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 템플릿첨부파일번호 */ , D.MNGR_JKW_NO AS MNGR_JKW_NO /* 담당자직원번호 */ , D.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN /* 확정여부 */ , D.IMPRV_YN AS IMPRV_YN /* 개선여부 */ , D.GYLJ_S_C AS GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태코드 */ , D.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , E.MDL_WGT_DTL_V AS MDL_WGT_DTL_V /* 모델가중치상세값 */ , (SELECT F.REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D F /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND F.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '4' /* R301 4 : 통제활동 운영 효과성 평가 */ AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '4.2' /* R302 4.2 : 통제활동 운영 취약점 개선 */ AND F.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_BRNO) AS REAL_EDT_4_2 /* 실제종료일자 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M C /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M D /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ ON C.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = D.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.7' THEN '1' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.8' THEN '2' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.9' THEN '3' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.10' THEN '4' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.11' THEN '5' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.12' THEN '6' END AS TONGJE_FLD_C , MDL_WGT_DTL_V AS MDL_WGT_DTL_V FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D /* RBA 위험평가 모델상세 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C IN ('2.1.7', '2.1.8', '2.1.9', '2.1.10', '2.1.11', '2.1.12')) E ON B.TONGJE_FLD_C = E.TONGJE_FLD_C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND D.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_10_doSearchList */ B.BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , B.TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ , B.TEST_RSLT AS TEST_RSLT_1 /* 테스트결과 */ , B.TEST_RSLT AS TEST_RSLT_2 /* 테스트결과 */ , B.TEST_RSLT AS TEST_RSLT_3 /* 테스트결과 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_10_getAttchFileList */ A.ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 첨부파일번호 */ , A.FILE_SER /* 파일일련번호 */ , A.FILE_POS /* 파일경로 */ , A.LOSC_FILE_NM /* 논리파일명 */ , A.PHSC_FILE_NM /* 물리파일명 */ , A.FILE_SIZE /* 파일사이즈 */ , A.DOWNLOAD_CNT /* 다운로드수 */ FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE A /* RBA_첨부파일 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M B /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = B.TP_ATTCH_FILE_NO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.FILE_SER

SELECT /* rba_30.RBA_30_04_03_10_getFilePathName */ A.FILE_POS /* 파일경로 */ , A.LOSC_FILE_NM /* 논리파일명 */ , A.PHSC_FILE_NM /* 물리파일명 */ FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE A /* RBA_첨부파일 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND A.FILE_SER = #{FILE_SER, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_1N_getRbaAttchFileSeq */ RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS ATTCH_FILE_NO FROM DUAL --for DB2 --SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_1N_getRbaAttchFileSeq */ -- (NEXTVAL FOR RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ) AS ATTCH_FILE_NO -- FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_12_getSampleResult1 */ B.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM AS DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , CASE WHEN B.SNO = 1 THEN ALL_CNT /* Sampling한 CDD 수행 건수 */ WHEN B.SNO = 2 THEN CNT1 /* Sampling한 CDD 수행건에 대하여 제3자(총무 등)가 점검한 CDD 수행 건수 */ WHEN B.SNO = 3 THEN CNT2 /* Sampling한 CDD 수행건에 대하여 신원확인 정보가 정확한 CDD 수행 건수 */ ELSE 0 END AS TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BAS_YYYY , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID , VALT_TRN , VALT_BRNO , COUNT(SNO) AS ALL_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT1 , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT02 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT2 FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY, TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, VALT_TRN, VALT_BRNO) C ON B.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_11_getSampleResult2 */ B.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM AS DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , CASE WHEN B.SNO = 1 THEN ALL_CNT /* 대리인이 수행한 거래에서 Sampling한 거래 건 수 */ WHEN B.SNO = 2 THEN CNT1 /* Sampling한 건에 대하여 대리인에 대한 고객확인 및 대리인 위임 확인 방법이 적절한 건수 */ ELSE 0 END AS TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BAS_YYYY , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID , VALT_TRN , VALT_BRNO , COUNT(SNO) AS ALL_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' AND RSLT02 = '1' AND RSLT03 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT1 FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY, TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, VALT_TRN, VALT_BRNO) C ON B.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_12_getSampleResult3 */ B.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM AS DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , CASE WHEN B.SNO = 1 THEN ALL_CNT /* 평가 대상 기간 중 Sampling한 법인거래 고객 */ WHEN B.SNO = 2 THEN CNT1 /* Sample 중 생략대상 고객 */ WHEN B.SNO = 3 THEN CNT2 /* Sampling한 법인 고객에 대하여 생략대상 고객 중 실제 생략 대상인 고객 */ WHEN B.SNO = 4 THEN CNT3 /* Sample 중 실소유자 확인 등록된 고객 */ WHEN B.SNO = 5 THEN CNT4 /* 실소유자 확인 방법이 대표자가 아닌 고객의 실소유자 검증 서류 징구한 고객 */ ELSE 0 END AS TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BAS_YYYY , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID , VALT_TRN , VALT_BRNO , COUNT(SNO) AS ALL_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT1 , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT02 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT2 , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT03 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT3 , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT04 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT4 FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY, TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, VALT_TRN, VALT_BRNO) C ON B.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_11_getSampleResult8 */ B.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO AS SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM AS DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , CASE WHEN B.SNO = 1 THEN ALL_CNT /* CTR Sampling한 거래 건 수 */ WHEN B.SNO = 2 THEN CNT1 /* Sampling한 건에 대하여 제외기관이 아닌 고객 거래 건수 */ ELSE 0 END AS TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BAS_YYYY , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID , VALT_TRN , VALT_BRNO , COUNT(SNO) AS ALL_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT1 FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY BAS_YYYY, TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, VALT_TRN, VALT_BRNO) C ON B.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_20_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , DATA13 /* DATA13 */ , DATA14 /* DATA14 */ , DATA15 /* DATA15 */ , DATA16 /* DATA16 */ , DATA17 /* DATA17 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ , RSLT02 /* RSLT02 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_21_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , DATA13 /* DATA13 */ , DATA14 /* DATA14 */ , DATA15 /* DATA15 */ , DATA16 /* DATA16 */ , DATA17 /* DATA17 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ , RSLT02 /* RSLT02 */ , CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' AND RSLT02 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN (RSLT01 IS NULL OR RSLT02 IS NULL) THEN '' WHEN (RSLT01 = '0' OR RSLT02 = '0') THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS RSLT /* 결과 */ , RSLT03 /* RSLT03 */ , CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' AND RSLT02 = '1' AND RSLT03 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN (RSLT01 IS NULL OR RSLT02 IS NULL OR RSLT03 IS NULL) THEN '' WHEN (RSLT01 = '0' OR RSLT02 = '0' OR RSLT03 = '0') THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS FNL_RSLT /* 최종결과 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_23_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_24_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , CASE WHEN DATA12 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN DATA12 = '0' THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , DATA13 /* DATA13 */ , DATA14 /* DATA14 */ , DATA15 /* DATA15 */ , DATA16 /* DATA16 */ , DATA17 /* DATA17 */ , DATA18 /* DATA18 */ , DATA19 /* DATA19 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ , RSLT02 /* RSLT02 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_25_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , CASE WHEN DATA12 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN DATA12 = '0' THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ , RSLT02 /* RSLT02 */ , CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' AND RSLT02 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN (RSLT01 IS NULL OR RSLT02 IS NULL) THEN '' WHEN (RSLT01 = '0' OR RSLT02 = '0') THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS RSLT /* 결과 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_26_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , CASE WHEN DATA12 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN DATA12 = '0' THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ , RSLT02 /* RSLT02 */ , CASE WHEN RSLT01 = '1' AND RSLT02 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN (RSLT01 IS NULL OR RSLT02 IS NULL) THEN '' WHEN (RSLT01 = '0' OR RSLT02 = '0') THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS RSLT /* 결과 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_27_doSearch */ BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , DATA01 /* DATA01 */ , DATA02 /* DATA02 */ , DATA03 /* DATA03 */ , DATA04 /* DATA04 */ , DATA05 /* DATA05 */ , DATA06 /* DATA06 */ , DATA07 /* DATA07 */ , DATA08 /* DATA08 */ , DATA09 /* DATA09 */ , DATA10 /* DATA10 */ , DATA11 /* DATA11 */ , CASE WHEN DATA12 = '1' THEN 'Ｏ' WHEN DATA12 = '0' THEN 'Ｘ' ELSE '' END AS DATA12 /* DATA12 */ , RSLT01 /* RSLT01 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_TMP_S_I /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 샘플 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_05_01_doSearch2 */ H.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , H.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , H.CNT_BY_WHL_VALT AS CNT_BY_WHL_VALT /* 전사평가건수 */ , H.CNT_BY_BR_VALT AS CNT_BY_BR_VALT /* 부점평가건수 */ , H.CNT_BY_6_VALT AS CNT_BY_6_VALT /* 보안평가건수 */ , H.CNT_BY_GYLJ_ING AS CNT_BY_GYLJ_ING /* 결재진행건수 */ , I.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_1 /* 부점별 평가 실제종료일 */ , J.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_2 /* 전사 위험평가 실제종료일 */ , K.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_5_3 /* 보안 위험평가 실제종료일 */ , L.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_4_1 /* 운영 평가 실제종료일 */ FROM (SELECT A.BAS_YYYY , A.VALT_TRN , SUM(CASE WHEN B.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C = '1' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_WHL_VALT , SUM(CASE WHEN B.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C = '2' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_BR_VALT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_6_VALT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND A.GYLJ_S_C <> '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT_BY_GYLJ_ING FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B /* RBA 통제활동 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID AND B.USYN = 1 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY, A.VALT_TRN) H JOIN (SELECT D.BAS_YYYY , D.REAL_EDT , D.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D D /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND D.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND D.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.1') I ON H.BAS_YYYY = I.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = I.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT E.BAS_YYYY , E.REAL_EDT , E.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D E /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND E.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND E.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.2') J ON H.BAS_YYYY = J.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = J.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT F.REAL_EDT , F.BAS_YYYY , F.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D F /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND F.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '5' AND F.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.3') K ON H.BAS_YYYY = K.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = K.VALT_TRN JOIN (SELECT G.REAL_EDT , G.BAS_YYYY , G.VALT_TRN FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D G /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND G.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND G.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND G.RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '4' AND G.RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '4.1') L ON H.BAS_YYYY = L.BAS_YYYY AND H.VALT_TRN = L.VALT_TRN WHERE 1=1 AND H.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND H.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_05_02_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , A.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , A.VALT_BRNO AS VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , D.DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM /* 부점명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , CASE WHEN A.GYLJ_ID = 0 AND (A.GYLJ_S_C = '0' OR A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL) THEN E.MDL_WGT_DTL_V ELSE A.OPR_EFF_RT END AS OPR_EFF_RT /* 운영효과성비율 */ , B.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ , A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태코드명 */ FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M B /* RBA 통제활동 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = B.TONGJE_ACT_ID JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B D /* AML부점_NIC41B */ ON A.VALT_BRNO = D.DPRT_CD JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.7' THEN '1' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.8' THEN '2' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.9' THEN '3' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.10' THEN '4' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.11' THEN '5' WHEN MDL_WGT_DTL_C = '2.1.12' THEN '6' END AS TONGJE_FLD_C , MDL_WGT_DTL_V AS MDL_WGT_DTL_V FROM KRBA_VALT_MD_D /* RBA 위험평가 모델상세 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_MDL_DTL_C = '2.1' AND MDL_WGT_DTL_C IN ('2.1.7', '2.1.8', '2.1.9', '2.1.10', '2.1.11', '2.1.12')) E ON C.TONGJE_FLD_C = E.TONGJE_FLD_C WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.GYLJ_ID = 0 AND (A.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0', '11', '12') OR A.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL) ORDER BY A.CH_ID, CAST(SUBSTR(A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, LENGTH(A.CH_ID) + 3, 2) AS INTEGER) -- for Oracle -- ORDER BY A.CH_ID, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, LENGTH(A.CH_ID) + 3, 2))

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_07_01_doSearch_TOT_RDY_CNT */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TOT_RDY_CNT AS TOT_RDY_CNT /* 총미진행건수 */ , B.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_2_4 /* 통제활동 확정 실제종료일 */ , C.REAL_EDT AS REAL_EDT_3_1 /* 통제활동 설계 평가 실제종료일 */ FROM (SELECT #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS BAS_YYYY , COUNT(A.TONGJE_ACT_ID) AS TOT_RDY_CNT FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.FIX_YN = 0) A JOIN (SELECT BAS_YYYY , REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '2' AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '2.4' AND VALT_TRN = 0) B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY JOIN (SELECT REAL_EDT , BAS_YYYY FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D /* RBA 위험평가 상세일정 */ WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_MNG_ACT_C = '3' AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.1' AND VALT_TRN = 0) C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_07_02_doSearch */ A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , C.DPRT_NM AS DPRT_NM /* 부점명 */ , A.AIM_STTP_RT AS AIM_STTP_RT /* 목적적합성비율 */ , A.OPR_POSS_RT AS OPR_POSS_RT /* 운영가능성비율 */ , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT /* 설계유효성비율 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.FIX_YN = 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C /* AML부점_NIC41B */ ON A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = C.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.TONGJE_ACT_ID

SELECT D.RSK_EVT_NM --지표명 , CASE WHEN A.TGT_BRNO='9999' THEN '영업점' ELSE (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.TGT_BRNO) END AS DPRT_NM --대상부점 , B.RSK_CATG_NM --리스크카테고리 , A.RSK_INDCT_NM --리스크이벤트 , A.RSK_INDCT_CTNT --리스크상세설명 , A.FRMUL_CTNT --산식 , A.MSUR_FRQ --측정주기 , '비율' AS RATIO --비율 , A.EXTR_TRM --산출기간 , A.EXTR_BAS_AMT --산출기준금액 , A.CNFR_ACTN_CTNT --대응조치내용 FROM KRBA_KRI_M A ,KRBA_RSK_CATG_I B ,KRBA_RSK_EVT_I D WHERE A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_CATG = D.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_FAC = D.RSK_FAC AND A.RSK_EVT = D.RSK_EVT AND A.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT}

SELECT SUBSTR(A.BAS_YYMM,5) AS BAS_MM2 --기준월 ,A.INDE_RT||'%' AS INDE_RT --증감율 ,(SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C='R335' AND DTL_C=C.RSK_GD_C) AS RSK_GD_C --위험등급코드 ,C.BRNO ,NVL(LENGTH(C.AF_ACTN_CTNT),0) SAVE_YN FROM KRBA_KRI_D A ,KRBA_KRI_BRNO_D C WHERE A.RSK_INDCT = C.RSK_INDCT AND A.BAS_YYMM = C.BAS_YYMM AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YY, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||#{BAS_MM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT D.RSK_EVT_NM --지표명 , CASE WHEN A.TGT_BRNO='9999' THEN '영업점' ELSE (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.TGT_BRNO) END AS DPRT_NM --대상부점 , B.RSK_CATG_NM --리스크카테고리 , A.RSK_INDCT_NM --리스크이벤트 , A.RSK_INDCT_CTNT --리스크상세설명 , A.FRMUL_CTNT --산식 , A.MSUR_FRQ --측정주기 , '비율' AS RATIO --비율 , A.EXTR_TRM --산출기간 , A.EXTR_BAS_AMT --산출기준금액 , A.CNFR_ACTN_CTNT --대응조치내용 , E.AF_ACTN_CTNT --후속조치내용 FROM KRBA_KRI_M A ,KRBA_RSK_CATG_I B ,KRBA_RSK_EVT_I D ,KRBA_KRI_BRNO_D E WHERE A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_CATG = D.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_FAC = D.RSK_FAC AND A.RSK_EVT = D.RSK_EVT AND E.RSK_INDCT = A.RSK_INDCT AND E.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT} AND E.BRNO = #{BRNO} AND E.BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM}

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B WHERE HG_RNK_DPRT_CD = '000100' AND SUBSTR(DPRT_CD,0,2) != '05' AND MOFC_BRN_CCD = 'M' AND USE_CCD = 'Y' ) AS M_BRNO
,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.OPR_VALT_BRNO) AS M_BRNO FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M A, BAS_LST B WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = B.C_YY AND A.OPR_VALT_BRNO != '9999' ) AS M_VALT_BRNO -- 평가 대상 본점수 ,(SELECT COUNT(DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B WHERE MOFC_BRN_CCD = 'B' AND USE_CCD = 'Y' ) AS B_BRNO ,(SELECT COUNT(BRNO) AS B_BRNO FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, BAS_LST B WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = B.C_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 ) AS B_VALT_BRNO FROM DUAL

--3.1 표 통합 (등급은 사용하지 마삼, 차이값은 알아서 계산, 99는 고정) WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT O_YY || '년' AS O_YY, MLTF_RSK_SCOR1, TONGJE_EFF_RT1,REMDR_RSK_SCOR1, EXPS_AMT1 , C_YY || '년' AS C_YY, MLTF_RSK_SCOR2, TONGJE_EFF_RT2,REMDR_RSK_SCOR2, EXPS_AMT2 FROM (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.MLTF_RSK_SCOR),3),0) AS MLTF_RSK_SCOR1 --ML/TF위험 전년 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT1 --통제효과성 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.REMDR_RSK_SCOR),3),0) AS REMDR_RSK_SCOR1 --잔여위험 --, NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C),0),0) AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C1 --등급 , NVL(SUM(AA.EXPS_AMT),0) AS EXPS_AMT1 --금액 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.MLTF_RSK_SCOR),3),0) AS MLTF_RSK_SCOR2 --ML/TF위험 당해년 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT2 --통제효과성 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.REMDR_RSK_SCOR),3),0) AS REMDR_RSK_SCOR2 --잔여위험 --, NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.MLTF_RSK_GD_C),0),0) AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C2 --등급 , NVL(SUM(BB.EXPS_AMT),0) AS EXPS_AMT2 --금액 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , A.BRNO , A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C --위험등급 , C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 , (SELECT AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT) FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN AND BRNO = A.BRNO ) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT , B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 , E.EXPS_AMT --노출위험금액 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A , KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B , KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I C , KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I E , BAS_LST D WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = D.O_YY --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 --PARAM AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN and A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = E.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = E.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = E.BRNO ) AA FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , A.BRNO , A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C --위험등급 , C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 , (SELECT AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT) FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN AND BRNO = A.BRNO ) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT , B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 , E.EXPS_AMT --노출위험금액 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A , KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B , KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I C , KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I E , BAS_LST D WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = D.C_YY --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 --PARAM AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN and A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = E.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = E.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = E.BRNO ) BB ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV ) , BAS_LST

SELECT AA.CNT ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', AA.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM ,AA.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 ,ROUND(AA.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 ,AA.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R338' AND DTL_C = AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C), AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C) AS MLTF_RSK_GD --위험등급
FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR DESC, C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR DESC) AS CNT ,A.BRNO ,A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C --위험등급 ,C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR --ML/TF위험 ,(SELECT AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT) FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I WHERE BAS_YYYY = A.BAS_YYYY AND VALT_TRN = A.VALT_TRN AND BRNO = A.BRNO ) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT ,B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B, KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I C WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO ORDER BY B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR DESC, C.MLTF_RSK_SCOR DESC ) AA

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM , NVL(BB.TRN_ATM,0) AS TRN_ATM -- 당해년 위험거래금액 , NVL(BB.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 당해년 통제효과성 , NVL(BB.REMDR_RSK_AMT,0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 당해년 잔여위험 , NVL(CC.TRN_ATM,0) AS TRN_ATM1 -- 전년 위험거래금액 , NVL(CC.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT1 -- 전년 통제효과성 , NVL(CC.REMDR_RSK_AMT,0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT1 -- 전년 잔여위험 FROM (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R333' ) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.SRVC_G_C ,ROUND(SUM(A.LST_TOT_V/1000000),0) AS TRN_ATM -- 당해년 위험거래금액 ,ROUND(SUM(B.REMDR_RSK_AMT/1000000),0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 당해년 잔여위험 ,ROUND(AVG(C.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --당해년 통제효과성 통합 FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B, KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I C, BAS_LST D WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = B.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = C.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = D.C_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY A.SRVC_G_C ) BB ON AA.DTL_C = BB.SRVC_G_C LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.SRVC_G_C ,ROUND(SUM(A.LST_TOT_V/1000000),0) AS TRN_ATM -- 당해년 위험거래금액 ,ROUND(SUM(B.REMDR_RSK_AMT/1000000),0) AS REMDR_RSK_AMT -- 당해년 잔여위험 ,ROUND(AVG(C.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --당해년 통제효과성 통합 FROM KRBA_EXPS_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_I B, KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I C, BAS_LST D WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = B.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO AND A.SRVC_G_C = C.SRVC_G_C AND A.BAS_YYYY = D.O_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY A.SRVC_G_C ) CC ON AA.DTL_C = CC.SRVC_G_C , BAS_LST DD ORDER BY DTL_C

SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.CH_GD),0),0) AS CH_GD --당해년 FIU 보고정보 보안위험 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT3 --당해년 보안통제 효과성 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(AA.REMDR_V),2),0) AS REMDR_V --당해년 잔여위험점수 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.CH_GD),0),0) AS CH_GD1 --전년 FIU 보고정보 보안위험 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.TONGJE_EFF_RT),0),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT4 --전년 보안통제 효과성 , NVL(ROUND(AVG(BB.REMDR_V),2),0) AS REMDR_V1 --전년 잔여위험점수 , #{BAS_YY} ||'년' AS C_YY2 , #{BAS_YY} - 1 ||'년' AS O_YY2 FROM (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(C.CH_GD,0) AS CH_GD --취약성 위험등급 , NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 , ROUND(NVL(C.CH_GD,0) * (100 - NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0))/100,2) AS REMDR_V --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = C.TONGJE_FLD_C AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY} ) AA FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT '1' AS KEYV , NVL(C.CH_GD,0) AS CH_GD --취약성 위험등급 , NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 , ROUND(NVL(C.CH_GD,0) * (100 - NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0))/100,2) AS REMDR_V --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = C.TONGJE_FLD_C AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY} - 1 ) BB ON AA.KEYV = BB.KEYV

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT AA.RSK_CATG_NM , NVL(BB.CAL_JIPYO_V ,0) AS CAL_JIPYO_V --당해년도 , NVL(CC.CAL_JIPYO_V ,0) AS CAL_JIPYO_V1 --전년도 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG, '[' || RSK_CATG || '] ' || RSK_CATG_NM ||'위험' AS RSK_CATG_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_CATG_I WHERE RSK_CATG IN ('1','2','3','4') UNION ALL SELECT '합계', '합계' FROM DUAL) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN GROUPING(RSK_CATG) = 1 THEN '합계' ELSE RSK_CATG END AS RSK_CATG ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) AS CAL_JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1, BAS_LST WHERE BAS_YYYY = C_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY ROLLUP (RSK_CATG) ) BB ON AA.RSK_CATG = BB.RSK_CATG LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN GROUPING(RSK_CATG) = 1 THEN '합계' ELSE RSK_CATG END AS RSK_CATG ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) AS CAL_JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1, BAS_LST WHERE BAS_YYYY = O_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY ROLLUP (RSK_CATG) ) CC ON AA.RSK_CATG = CC.RSK_CATG ORDER BY AA.RSK_CATG

SELECT ROUND(AVG(A.EXPS_SCOR),3) AS EXPS_SCOR --노출위험SCORE , ROUND(AVG(B.BSRSK_SCOR),3) AS BSRSK_SCOR --사업위험SCORE , ROUND(AVG(A.BZRSK_GD),0) AS BSRSK_GD --사업위험등급 , SUM(C.EXPS_AMT) AS EXPS_AMT --MLTF 위험거래금액(노출금액) , ROUND(AVG(A.MLTF_RSK_SCOR),3) AS MLTF_RSK_SCOR --MLTF SCORE FROM KRBA_MLTF_EXTR_I A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_BZRSK_LST_I B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_EXPS_SCOR_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = C.BRNO WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY, A.VALT_TRN

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT '['||DTL_C||'] '|| DTL_C_NM AS DTL_C_NM , NVL(BB.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 당해년 통제효과성 , NVL(CC.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT1 -- 전년도 통제효과성 FROM (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308') AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2, BAS_LST B WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.C_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C) BB ON AA.DTL_C = BB.TONGJE_FLD_C LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2, BAS_LST C WHERE BAS_YYYY = C.O_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C) CC ON AA.DTL_C = CC.TONGJE_FLD_C ORDER BY DTL_C

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM FROM DUAL ) SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM , NVL(BB.BRNO_CNT,0) AS BRNO_CNT -- 부점수 , NVL(BB.REMDR_RSK_SCOR,0) AS REMDR_RSK_SCOR -- 잔여위험Score ,(SELECT LISTAGG(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, ''), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BRNO) FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I, BAS_LST WHERE BAS_YYYY = C_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 AND MLTF_RSK_GD_C = AA.DTL_C_NM AND ROWNUM <= 3 ) AS BRNM -- 주요부점 FROM (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R338') AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MLTF_RSK_GD_C , COUNT(DISTINCT A.BRNO) AS BRNO_CNT --부점수 , ROUND(AVG(B.REMDR_RSK_SCOR),2) AS REMDR_RSK_SCOR --잔여위험Score FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, KRBA_REMDR_RSK_BRNO_I B, BAS_LST WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = C_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 AND A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.BRNO = B.BRNO GROUP BY MLTF_RSK_GD_C ) BB ON AA.DTL_C_NM = BB.MLTF_RSK_GD_C ORDER BY DTL_C

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT AA.BRNM ,AA.MLTF_RSK_GD_C AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C --당해년도 ,BB.MLTF_RSK_GD_C AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C1 --전년도 FROM (SELECT BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNM ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R338' AND DTL_C = A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C ), A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C) AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C -- 당해년도 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, BAS_LST WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = C_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 --1 ) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNM ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R338' AND DTL_C = A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C ), A.MLTF_RSK_GD_C) AS MLTF_RSK_GD_C -- 전년도 FROM KRBA_MLTF_LST_I A, BAS_LST WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = O_YY AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 --1 ) BB ON AA.BRNO = BB.BRNO ORDER BY AA.BRNO

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT CASE WHEN BB.BRNM IS NOT NULL THEN BB.BRNM ELSE CC.BRNM END BRNM , NVL(BB.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT -- 당해년 통제효과성 , NVL(CC.TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT1 -- 전년도 통제효과성 FROM (SELECT BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNM ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I, BAS_LST B WHERE BAS_YYYY = B.C_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 --1 GROUP BY BRNO) BB FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNM ,ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I, BAS_LST C WHERE BAS_YYYY = C.O_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99 GROUP BY BRNO) CC ON BB.BRNO = CC.BRNO ORDER BY BB.BRNO
SELECT DTL_C , DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R333' --서비스구분코드 ORDER BY DTL_C

WITH BAS_LST AS ( SELECT #{BAS_YY} AS C_YY --PARAM ,#{BAS_YY} - 1 AS O_YY FROM DUAL ) SELECT AA.RSK_CATG_NM , NVL(BB.CAL_JIPYO_V ,0) AS CAL_JIPYO_V --당해년도 , NVL(CC.CAL_JIPYO_V ,0) AS CAL_JIPYO_V1 --전년도 FROM (SELECT RSK_CATG, '[' || RSK_CATG || '] ' || RSK_CATG_NM AS RSK_CATG_NM FROM KRBA_RSK_CATG_I WHERE RSK_CATG IN ('1','2','3','4') UNION ALL SELECT '합계', '합계' FROM DUAL) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN GROUPING(RSK_CATG) = 1 THEN '합계' ELSE RSK_CATG END AS RSK_CATG ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) AS CAL_JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1, BAS_LST WHERE BAS_YYYY = C_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99
AND SRVC_G_C = #{SRVC_G_C} --서비스구분코드 R333 ------------
GROUP BY ROLLUP (RSK_CATG) ) BB ON AA.RSK_CATG = BB.RSK_CATG LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN GROUPING(RSK_CATG) = 1 THEN '합계' ELSE RSK_CATG END AS RSK_CATG ,SUM(CAL_JIPYO_V) AS CAL_JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1, BAS_LST WHERE BAS_YYYY = O_YY AND VALT_TRN = 99
AND SRVC_G_C = #{SRVC_G_C} --서비스구분코드 R333 -------------
GROUP BY ROLLUP (RSK_CATG) ) CC ON AA.RSK_CATG = CC.RSK_CATG ORDER BY AA.RSK_CATG

SELECT DTL_C , DTL_C_NM , NVL(CH_GD,0) AS CH_GD , NVL(TONGJE_EFF_RT,0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT , NVL(REMDR_V,0) AS REMDR_V FROM KRBA_DTL_C AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TONGJE_PROC_C , ROUND(AVG(CH_GD),0) AS CH_GD , ROUND(AVG(TONGJE_EFF_RT),0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT , ROUND(AVG(REMDR_V),2) AS REMDR_V FROM (SELECT C.TONGJE_PROC_C , NVL(C.CH_GD,0) AS CH_GD --취약성 위험등급 , NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0) AS TONGJE_EFF_RT --통제효과성 , ROUND(NVL(C.CH_GD,0) * (100 - NVL(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT, 0))/100,2) AS REMDR_V --잔여위험 FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_T2 A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = C.TONGJE_FLD_C AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = '6' AND A.VALT_TRN = 99 WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} --PARAM ) GROUP BY TONGJE_PROC_C ) BB ON AA.DTL_C = BB. TONGJE_PROC_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C IN ('6.1', '6.2', '6.3') ORDER BY DTL_C

SELECT '[' || TONGJE_FLD_C || '] ' || TONGJE_FLD_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM -- 영역명 ,'[' || TONGJE_PROC_C || '] ' || TONGJE_PROC_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM -- 프로세스명 , RT || '%' AS RT -- 설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT -- 취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT -- 개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , TONGJE_PROC_C, DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C , ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,D.TONGJE_FLD_C ,D.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M D ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = D.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY} AND A.VALT_TRN = 2
) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C ) BB -- PROCESS 별 LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON BB.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' ) ORDER BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C

SELECT '[' || TONGJE_FLD_C || '] ' || TONGJE_FLD_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM -- 영역명 ,'[' || TONGJE_PROC_C || '] ' || TONGJE_PROC_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM -- 프로세스명 , RT ||'%' AS RT -- 설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT -- 취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT -- 개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , TONGJE_PROC_C , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , TONGJE_PROC_C , ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID , A.CH_ID ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YY} --PARAM 기준연도 ) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C ) BB -- PROCESS 별 LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON BB.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' ) ORDER BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TOT_V DESC ) AS CNT --순번 ,BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM ,CATG1, CATG2, CATG3, CATG4, TOT_V FROM ( SELECT BRNO ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '1' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS CATG1 --국가 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '2' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS CATG2 --고객 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '3' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS CATG3 --상품 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '4' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS CATG4 --채널 ,SUM(A.CAL_JIPYO_V) AS TOT_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN} GROUP BY BRNO ) AA ORDER BY TOT_V DESC

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TOT_V DESC ) AS CNT --순번 ,BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM ,SRVC01, SRVC02, SRVC03, SRVC04, SRVC05, SRVC06, SRVC07, SRVC08, SRVC09, SRVC10, SRVC11, SRVC12,TOT_V FROM ( SELECT BRNO ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC01 --사망보험 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC02 --생존보험 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC03 --생사혼합 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC04 --변액보험 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC05 --단체보험 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC06 --기업형 퇴직연금 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC07 --개인형 퇴직연금 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC08 --약관대출 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC09 --신용대출 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC10 --담보대출 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC11 --PF대출 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN A.CAL_JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC12 --수익증권 ,SUM(A.CAL_JIPYO_V) AS TOT_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_T1 A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN} GROUP BY BRNO ) AA ORDER BY TOT_V DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TOT_V DESC ) AS CNT --순번 ,BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM ,SRVC01, SRVC02, SRVC03, SRVC04, SRVC05, SRVC06, SRVC07, SRVC08, SRVC09, SRVC10, SRVC11, SRVC12,TOT_V FROM ( SELECT A.BRNO ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC01 --사망보험 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC02 --생존보험 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC03 --생사혼합 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC04 --변액보험 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC05 --단체보험 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC06 --기업형 퇴직연금 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC07 --개인형 퇴직연금 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC08 --약관대출 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC09 --신용대출 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC10 --담보대출 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC11 --PF대출 ,AVG(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN A.TONGJE_EFF_RT ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC12 --수익증권 ,AVG(A.TONGJE_EFF_RT) AS TOT_V FROM KRBA_TJEFF_EXTR_LST_I A WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN} GROUP BY A.BRNO ) AA ORDER BY TOT_V DESC

SELECT '1' AS IMPRV_B_C --개선분류코드_R382 , A.BAS_YYYY --기준연도 , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID --통제황동ID , A.CH_ID --취약점ID , B.TONGJE_FLD_C --영역코드 , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM --영역 , B.TONGJE_PROC_C --프로세스코드 , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM --Process , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C --서브프로세스코드 , DTL2.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_NM --SubProcess , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE --통제제목 , A.AIM_STTP_RT --운영가능성비율 , A.OPR_POSS_RT --설계유효성비율 , A.DSGN_VALD_RT ||' %' AS RT --운영효과성 , (SELECT CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM IS NULL THEN '미수행' ELSE DTL_C_NM END FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = C.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_NM --결재상태명(개선상태) , CASE WHEN ((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') > (CASE WHEN D.IMPRV_GOAL_DT IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE D.IMPRV_GOAL_DT END)) AND (CASE WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE C.GYLJ_S_C END) != '3') THEN '기간초과' WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C = '3' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '-' END AS GYLJ_S_NM2 --개선목표일자 , CASE WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE C.GYLJ_S_C END AS GYLJ_S_C --결재상태코드 , IMPRV_GOAL_DT --개선목표일자 , A.CHG_DT --변경일자 , C.FIX_YN --확정여부 , C.GYLJ_ID --결재ID , C.GYLJ_S_C --결재상태코드 , A.IMPRV_YN --개선여부 , C.IMPRV_PROC_CTNT --개선처리내용 , C.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO --개선처리자 , C.IMPRV_DT --개선처리일자 , C.ATTCH_FILE_NO --첨부파일번호 FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A --통제활동 테이블 JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_CH_I D --통제활동 취약점 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = D.TONGJE_ACT_ID AND A.IMPRV_YN = 1 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B --내부통제 취약점 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C --통제활동 개선조치 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL --RBA 상세코드 테이블 ON B.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON B.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL2 ON B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = DTL2.DTL_C AND DTL2.GRP_C = 'R310' WHERE 1=1
AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND B.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND B.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND C.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 결재상태
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR C.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR C.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND C.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND C.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
ORDER BY A.CH_ID, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, LENGTH(A.CH_ID) + 3, 2))

SELECT '2' AS IMPRV_B_C --개선분류코드_R382 , A.BAS_YYYY --기준연도 , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID --통제활동 ID , A.CH_ID --취약점 ID , B.TONGJE_FLD_C --영역코드 , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM --영역 , B.TONGJE_PROC_C --통제프로세스코드 , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM --통제프로세스 , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C --서브프로세스코드 , DTL2.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_NM --서브프로세스 , E.TONGJE_ACT_TITE --통제활동제목 , A.OPR_EFF_RT || ' %' AS RT --운영효과성 , A.TONGJE_EFF_RT --설계유효성비율 , (SELECT CASE WHEN DTL_C_NM IS NULL THEN '미수행' ELSE DTL_C_NM END FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = C.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_NM --결재상태명(개선상태) , CASE WHEN ((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') > (CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_DT IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE C.IMPRV_DT END)) AND (CASE WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE C.GYLJ_S_C END) != '3') THEN '기간초과' WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C = '3' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '-' END AS GYLJ_S_NM2 --개선목표일자 , CASE WHEN C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE C.GYLJ_S_C END AS GYLJ_S_C --결재상태코드 , C.IMPRV_DT AS IMPRV_GOAL_DT --개선일자 , A.CHG_DT --변경일자 , E.IMPRV_YN --개선여부 , A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID --통제운영평가ID , C.FIX_YN --확정여부 , C.GYLJ_ID --결재ID , C.ATTCH_FILE_NO --첨부파일 , A.VALT_BRNO --부점번호 , A.VALT_TRN --평가회차 FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A --부점별통제운영평가 테이블 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B --내부통제취약점 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID AND A.IMPRV_YN = '1' JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M D --통제운영평가 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = D.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_M E --통제활동 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = E.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = E.TONGJE_ACT_ID AND A.CH_ID = E.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C --통제운영평가개선조치 테이블 ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL --RBA 상세코드 테이블 ON B.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON B.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL2 ON B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = DTL2.DTL_C AND DTL2.GRP_C = 'R310' WHERE 1=1
AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=NUMERIC} --PARAM 평가회차
AND A.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND A.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND C.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 결재상태
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND (C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR C.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND (C.GYLJ_S_C IS NULL OR C.GYLJ_S_C IN ('0','11','12','22'))
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND C.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND C.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND C.GYLJ_ID <> 0 AND C.GYLJ_S_C = '21'
ORDER BY A.CH_ID, TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, LENGTH(A.CH_ID) + 3, 2))

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY -- 기준연도 , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C -- 통제영역코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM -- 통제영역코드명 , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C -- 통제프로세스코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM -- 통제프로세스코드명 , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C -- 통제서브프로세스코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM -- 통제서브프로세스코드명 , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID -- 취약점ID , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT -- 취약점내용 , B.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C -- 취약점원인코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320' AND DTL_C = B.CH_CAUS_C) AS CH_CAUS_C_NM -- 취약점원인코드명 , B.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C -- 취약점유형LV1코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R321' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV1_C) AS CH_TP_LV1_C_NM -- 취약점유형LV1코드명 , B.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C -- 취약점유형LV2코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R322' AND DTL_C = B.CH_TP_LV2_C) AS CH_TP_LV2_C_NM -- 취약점유형LV2코드명 , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID -- 통제활동ID , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE -- 통제활동제목 , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL -- 통제활동상세 , A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C -- 통제적용범위코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R324' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C) AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C_NM -- 통제적용범위코드명 , A.TONGJE_TP_C AS TONGJE_TP_C -- 통제유형코드 , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO -- 설계평가부점번호 , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO) AS DSGN_VALT_BR_NM -- 설계평가부점명 , A.DSGN_VALD_RT AS DSGN_VALD_RT -- 설계유효성비율 , A.AIM_STTP_RT AS AIM_STTP_RT -- 목적적합성비율 , A.OPR_POSS_RT AS OPR_POSS_RT -- 운영가능성비율 , C.DSGN_CH_ID AS DSGN_CH_ID -- 설계취약점ID , C.DSGN_CH_TITE AS DSGN_CH_TITE -- 설계취약점제목 , C.ISSU_DTL_CTNT AS ISSU_DTL_CTNT -- 이슈상세내역 , C.IMPRV_TP_C AS IMPRV_TP_C -- 개선유형코드 , C.LSTR_G_C AS LSTR_G_C -- 장단기구분코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM -- 개선명 FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R329' AND DTL_C = C.IMPRV_TP_C) AS IMPRV_TP_C_NM , C.LSTR_G_C AS LSTR_G_C -- 장단기구분코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R330' AND DTL_C = C.LSTR_G_C) AS LSTR_G_C_NM -- 장단기명 , C.IMPRV_GOAL_DT AS IMPRV_GOAL_DT -- 개선목표일자 , C.IMPRV_BRNO AS IMPRV_BRNO -- 개선부점번호 , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.IMPRV_BRNO) AS IMPRV_BR_NM -- 개선부점명 , C.IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO AS IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO -- 개선이행담당자번호 , (SELECT USER_NM -- 개선담당자 FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = C.IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO) AS IMPRV_PEFO_MNG_JKW_NO_NM , C.TOBE_TONGJE_ACT AS TOBE_TONGJE_ACT -- TOBE통제활동 , D.ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO -- 개선첨부파일번호 , D.IMPRV_PROC_CTNT AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT -- 개선처리내용 , D.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO AS IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO -- 개선처리자번호 , (SELECT USER_NM -- 개선담당자 FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = D.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO) AS IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO_NM -- 개선담당자명 , D.IMPRV_DT AS IMPRV_DT -- 개선일 , D.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , D.GYLJ_S_C AS GYLJ_S_C -- 결재코드 , D.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN -- 확정여부 FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A -- RBA 통제활동 JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B -- RBA 내부통제 취약점 ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJ_ACT_CH_I C -- RBA 통제활동 취약점 ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I D -- RBA 통제활동 개선조치 ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = D.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도ID
AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID
AND B.CH_ID = #{CH_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID

SELECT TONGJE_ACT_ID , FIX_YN , GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I WHERE 1=1
AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도ID
AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준연도 */ , B.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM /* 통제영역코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_PROC_C_NM /* 통제프로세스코드명 */ , B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310' AND DTL_C = B.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C) AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드명 */ , B.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_TITE AS TONGJE_ACT_TITE /* 통제활동제목 */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_ID AS TONGJE_ACT_ID /* 통제활동ID */ , A.TONGJE_ACT_DTL AS TONGJE_ACT_DTL /* 통제활동상세 */ , A.BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM AS BIZ_RULE_REL_ITEM /* 업무규정관련항목 */ , C.TEST_STEP_CTNT AS TEST_STEP_CTNT /* 테스트절차내용 */ , C.TEST_PROF_CTNT AS TEST_PROF_CTNT /* 테스트증빙내용 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R324' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C) AS TONGJE_APPL_SCOP_C_NM /* 통제적용범위코드명 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.TONGJE_TP_C) AS TONGJE_TP_C_NM /* 통제유형코드명 */ , A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO /* 설계평가부점번호 */ , C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AS TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R326' AND DTL_C = C.VALT_TP_C) AS VALT_TP_C_NM /* 평가유형코드명 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BRNO AS OPR_VALT_BRNO /* 운영평가부점번호 */ , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC41B X , NIC92B Y WHERE C.OPR_VALT_BRNO = X.DPRT_CD AND X.MOFC_BRN_CCD = Y.CNTNT AND Y.CD = 'M043') AS VALT_MOFC_BRN_CCD /* 평가본사지점구분코드명 */ , C.VALT_METH_CTNT AS VALT_METH_CTNT /* 평가방법내용 */ , C.OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT AS OPR_VALT_BAS_CTNT /* 운영평가가준내용 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R327' AND DTL_C = C.VALT_FRQ_C) AS VALT_FRQ_C_NM /* 평가주기코드 */ , C.GOAL_V_CTNT AS GOAL_V_CTNT /* 목표값내용 */ , C.SMPL_YN AS SMPL_YN /* 샘플링여부 */ , C.KOFIU_JIPYO_ID AS KOFIU_JIPYO_ID /* KoFIU지표ID */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R328' AND DTL_C = C.OPR_VALT_TP_C) AS OPR_VALT_TP_C_NM /* 운영평가TYPE코드명 */ , C.TEST_TMP_FILE_NM AS TEST_TMP_FILE_NM /* 테스트템플릿파일명 */ , D.TP_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS TP_ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 템플릿첨부파일번호 */ , D.MNGR_JKW_NO AS MNGR_JKW_NO /* 담당자직원번호 */ , E.IMPRV_PROC_CTNT AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT /* 개선처리내용 */ , E.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO AS IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO /* 개선처리자번호 */ , (SELECT USER_NM /* 개선담당자 */ FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = E.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO) AS IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO_NM , E.IMPRV_DT AS IMPRV_DT /* 개선일 */ , E.IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT AS IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT /* 개선결과내용 */ , E.ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 개선첨부파일번호 */ , E.GYLJ_S_C AS GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태 */ , E.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , E.GYLJ_JKW_NO AS GYLJ_JKW_NO /* 결재자 */ , E.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일 */ , E.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN /* 개선여부 */ , D.OPR_EFF_RT AS OPR_EFF_RT /* 운영효과성비율 */ , C.TJ_ATTCH_FILE_NO AS TJ_ATTCH_FILE_NO /* 통제첨부파일번호 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A /* RBA 통제활동 */ JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M C /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = C.CH_ID AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M D /* RBA 부점별 통제운영평가 */ ON C.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = D.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I E /* 통제운영평가 개선조치 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = E.BAS_YYYY AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = E.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND D.VALT_TRN = E.VALT_TRN AND D.VALT_BRNO = E.VALT_BRNO WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND D.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_05_01_03_doSearchList */ B.BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID /* 통제운영평가ID */ , B.VALT_TRN /* 평가회차 */ , B.VALT_BRNO /* 평가부점 */ , B.SNO /* 순번 */ , A.DTL_ITEM /* 세부항목 */ , B.TEST_RSLT /* 테스트결과 */ , CASE WHEN C.OPR_VALT_TP_C IN ('2', '3', '4') THEN B.TEST_RSLT WHEN C.OPR_VALT_TP_C = '6' AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID IN ('3.3.2_R1_C9_T1', '3.3.2_R1_C10_T1') THEN B.TEST_RSLT WHEN B.TEST_RSLT = '0' THEN 'X' WHEN B.TEST_RSLT = '1' THEN 'O' ELSE B.TEST_RSLT END AS TEST_RSLT_NM /* 테스트결과표시 */ FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A /* RBA 통제운영평가 템플릿 */ JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B /* RBA 부점별 템플릿 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO JOIN KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_M C /* RBA 통제운영평가 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* RBA_30.RBA_30_04_03_10_doSearchResult */ B.BAS_YYYY , B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID , B.VALT_TRN , B.VALT_BRNO , CASE WHEN B.TEST_RSLT = 'Y' THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS OPR_EFF_RT FROM KRBA_TJ_OP_VALT_T A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_BRNO_VALT_T B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.SNO = B.SNO WHERE 1=1 AND B.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND B.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO -- 첨부파일번호 , FILE_SER -- 파일일련번호 , DATA_G -- 자료유형 , FILE_POS -- 파일경로 , LOSC_FILE_NM -- 논리파일명 , PHSC_FILE_NM -- 물리파일명 , FILE_SIZE -- 파일사이즈 , DOWNLOAD_CNT --다운로드수 , DR_DT -- 등록일자 , DR_TIME -- 등록시간 , DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE /* 첨부파일테이블 */ WHERE 1=1
AND ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I SET FIX_YN = #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 , FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 , FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 , GYLJ_S_C= #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재코드 , GYLJ_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --결재일자 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재자 , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{FIX_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --통제활동ID

UPDATE KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I SET FIX_YN = #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} --여부 1은 확정 0은 진행 , FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --확정된일자 , FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --확정된사람 , GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재코드 , GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --결재일자 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재자 , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --통제활동ID AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} --평가회차 AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --평가부점
mapper.select:
SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C -- 영역코드 , TONGJE_FLD_NM -- 영역명 , TONGJE_PROC_C -- 프로세스코드 , TONGJE_PROC_NM -- 프로세스명 , RT ||'%' AS RT -- 설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT -- 취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT -- 개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , TONGJE_PROC_C , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , TONGJE_PROC_C , ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID , A.CH_ID ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND B.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND B.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C ) BB -- PROCESS 별 LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON BB.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' UNION ALL SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , '99' AS TONGJE_PROC_C , DTL.DTL_C_NM || ' 평균' AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND B.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND B.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C ) BB LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' UNION ALL SELECT '99' AS TONGJE_FLD_C, '전체 평균' AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , '' AS TONGJE_PROC_C , '' AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND B.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND B.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
) AA ) BB ) ORDER BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C

SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C -- 영역코드 , TONGJE_FLD_NM -- 영역명 , TONGJE_PROC_C -- 프로세스코드 , TONGJE_PROC_NM -- 프로세스명 , RT || '%' AS RT -- 설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT -- 취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT -- 개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , TONGJE_PROC_C, DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C , ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,D.TONGJE_FLD_C ,D.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M D ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = D.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND D.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND D.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 평가회차
) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C ) BB -- PROCESS 별 LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON BB.TONGJE_PROC_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R309' UNION ALL SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C, DTL.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , '99' AS TONGJE_PROC_C , DTL.DTL_C_NM || ' 평균' AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT TONGJE_FLD_C , ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,D.TONGJE_FLD_C ,D.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M D ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = D.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND D.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND D.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 평가회차
) AA GROUP BY TONGJE_FLD_C ) BB LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON BB.TONGJE_FLD_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R308' UNION ALL SELECT '99' AS TONGJE_FLD_C, '전체 평균' AS TONGJE_FLD_NM , '' AS TONGJE_PROC_C , '' AS TONGJE_PROC_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 ,ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,D.TONGJE_FLD_C ,D.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M D ON A.BAS_YYYY = D.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = D.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE
A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND D.TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 영역
AND D.TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM PROCESS
AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{DSGN_VALT_BRNO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 설계부점
AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 평가회차
