) AA ) BB ) ORDER BY TONGJE_FLD_C, TONGJE_PROC_C

SELECT DSGN_VALT_BRNO -- 설계평가부점번호 , DPRT_NM --설계평가부점명 , RT ||'%' RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT DSGN_VALT_BRNO ,NIC.DPRT_NM --평가부점 , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT DSGN_VALT_BRNO , ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND C.GYLJ_DT = #{GYLJ_DT , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자
AND C.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자
) AA GROUP BY DSGN_VALT_BRNO ) BB LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B NIC ON BB.DSGN_VALT_BRNO = NIC.DPRT_CD UNION ALL SELECT '999' AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO , '합계' AS DPRT_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM (SELECT DSGN_VALT_BRNO , ROUND(AVG(DSGN_VALD_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.TONGJE_ACT_ID, A.CH_ID ,A.DSGN_VALT_BRNO ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.DSGN_VALD_RT ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M A JOIN KRBA_INTJ_CH_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = B.CH_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = C.TONGJE_ACT_ID WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND C.GYLJ_DT = #{GYLJ_DT , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자
AND C.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자
) AA ) BB ) ORDER BY DSGN_VALT_BRNO ASC

SELECT VALT_BRNO -- 평가부점번호 , DPRT_NM -- 평가부점명 , RT ||'%' RT -- 설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT -- 취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT -- 개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT VALT_BRNO ,NIC.DPRT_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT VALT_BRNO -- 부점범호 , ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT -- , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.VALT_BRNO ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.TONGJE_FLD_C ,A.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND A.VALD_TRN = #{VALD_TRN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 평가회차
AND A.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 개선상태
AND C.GYLJ_DT = #{GYLJ_DT , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자 (결재일기준)
) AA GROUP BY VALT_BRNO ) BB LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B NIC ON BB.VALT_BRNO = NIC.DPRT_CD UNION ALL SELECT '999' AS DSGN_VALT_BRNO , '합계' AS DPRT_NM , RT --설계유효성비율 , CH_CNT --취약점수 , IMPRV_CNT --개선된취약점수 , ROUND( IMPRV_CNT/DECODE(CH_CNT,0,1,CH_CNT) * 100,1) ||'%' AS IMPRV_RT -- 개선비율 FROM ( SELECT VALT_BRNO , ROUND(AVG(OPR_EFF_RT),1) AS RT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CH_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN (IMPRV_YN = 1) AND (GYLJ_S_C = '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.VALT_BRNO ,A.OPR_EFF_RT ,A.TONGJE_FLD_C ,A.TONGJE_PROC_C ,A.IMPRV_YN ,NVL(C.GYLJ_S_C,'0') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM KRBA_BRNO_VALT_M A JOIN KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I C ON A.BAS_YYYY = C.BAS_YYYY AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = C.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_BRNO = C.VALT_BRNO WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준연도
AND A.VALD_TRN = #{VALD_TRN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 평가회차
AND A.GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 개선상태
AND C.GYLJ_DT = #{GYLJ_DT , jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM 기준일자 (결재일 기준)
) AA ) BB ) ORDER BY VALT_BRNO ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I SET GYLJ_S_C = '11' --결재코드 , GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --결재일자 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재자 , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}--통제활동ID
mapper.select: SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO , FILE_SER , FILE_POS , LOSC_FILE_NM , PHSC_FILE_NM , FILE_SIZE , DOWNLOAD_CNT , DATA_G , DR_OP_JKW_NO , DR_DT , DR_TIME FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_ATTCH_FILE (ATTCH_FILE_NO, -- 첨부파일번호 FILE_SER, -- 파일일련번호 DATA_G, -- 자료유형 FILE_POS, -- 파일경로 LOSC_FILE_NM, -- 논리파일명 PHSC_FILE_NM, -- 물리파일명 FILE_SIZE, -- 파일사이즈 DOWNLOAD_CNT, -- 다운로드수 DR_DT, -- 등록일자 DR_TIME, -- 등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록조작자번호 ) VALUES ( #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 첨부파일번호 ,#{FILE_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 파일일련번호 ,#{DATA_G,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 자료유형 ,#{FILE_POS,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 파일경로 ,#{LOSC_FILE_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 논리파일명 ,#{PHSC_FILE_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 물리파일명 ,#{FILE_SIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 파일사이즈 ,#{DOWNLOAD_CNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 다운로드수 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 등록조작자번호 )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_SER)+1,1) AS MAX_SER FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I SET IMPRV_PROC_CTNT = #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 개선처리내용 , IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO = #{IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 개선처리자번호 , IMPRV_DT = #{IMPRV_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 개선일자 , IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT = #{IMPRV_RSLT_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 개선결과내용 , FIX_YN = '0'
, ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 첨부파일번호
, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 변경처리자번호 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제운영평가ID AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- PARAM 평가회차 AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가부점

UPDATE KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I SET GYLJ_S_C = '11' -- 결재코드 11 저장 , GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 결재일자 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 결재자
, ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO , jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 첨부파일번호
, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 변경일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준년도 AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- PARAM 평가회차 AND VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가부점
mapper.select: SELECT A.GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , A.GYLJ_SER -- 결재 일련번호 , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID ) AS GYLJ_GD_NM -- 결재자 , A.GYLJ_G_C -- 결재구분코드 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C ) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM -- 결재구분명 , A.GYLJ_DT -- 결재일자 , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO ) AS HNDL_JKW_NM -- 결재자명 , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , NIC41B E WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO AND D.DEP_ID = E.DPRT_CD ) AS HNDL_DEP_NM -- 부서명 , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID ) AS ROLE_NM -- ROLE명 , A.NOTE_CTNT -- 비고내용 , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DR_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' ||TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DR_TIME, 'HH24:MI:SS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 결재자명 FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H A WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 결재ID ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY -- 기준연도 , A.GYLJ_ID -- 결재ID , A.GYLJ_S_C -- 결재상태코드 , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO -- 결재자 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C ='R323' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C ) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM -- 결재상태명 , CASE WHEN GYLJ_S_C IN ('12', '3') AND GYLJ_ID = 0 THEN (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.FIX_JKW_NO) ELSE (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) END AS GYLJ_JKW_NO_NM -- 결재자명
FROM KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I A -- RBA 통제활동 개선조치 WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- PARAM 결재ID AND A.TONGJE_ACT_ID = #{TONGJE_ACT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID
FROM KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I A -- RBA 통제운영평가 개선조치 WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND A.TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID = #{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제운영평가ID AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- PARAM 평가회차 AND A.VALT_BRNO = #{VALT_BRNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가부점 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} -- PARAM 결재ID
SELECT GYLJ_SER -- 결재일련번호 FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H -- 결재이력 테이블 WHERE GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY GYLJ_SER DESC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO KRBA_GYLJ_H -- 결재이력 테이블 ( GYLJ_ID ,GYLJ_SER ,GYLJ_G_C ,GYLJ_S_C ,GYLJ_DT ,GYLJ_JKW_NO ,ROLE_ID ,NOTE_CTNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재ID , #{GYLJ_SER, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재일련번호 , #{GYLJ_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재구분코드 , #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재상태코드 , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --결재일자 , #{GYLJ_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --결재직원번호 , #{ROLE_IDS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --ROLE_ID , #{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --비고내용 , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') --등록날짜 , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') --등록시간 , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --등록조작자 )

UPDATE KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I -- 통제활동 개선조치 테이블 SET GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재상태코드 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재자번호 , GYLJ_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 변경자번호 WHERE BAS_YYYY=#{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND TONGJE_ACT_ID=#{TONGJE_ACT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제활동ID AND GYLJ_ID=#{GYLJ_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재ID

UPDATE KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I -- 통제운영평가 개선조치 SET GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재상태코드 , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재자번호 , GYLJ_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 변경자번호 WHERE BAS_YYYY=#{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID=#{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제운영평가ID AND GYLJ_ID=#{GYLJ_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재ID AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가회차; AND VALT_BRNO=#{VALT_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가부점;
mapper.select: SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER, DATA_G, FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_CNT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FILE_SER = #{FILE_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT KRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_TJACT_IMPRV_I -- 통제운영평가 개선조치 SET GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재상태코드 WHERE BAS_YYYY=#{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND TONGJE_ACT_ID=#{TONGJE_ACT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제운영평가ID

UPDATE KRBA_OPV_IMPRV_I -- 통제운영평가 개선조치 SET GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 결재상태코드 WHERE BAS_YYYY=#{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 기준연도 AND TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID=#{TONGJE_OPR_VALT_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 통제운영평가ID AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 평가회차 AND VALT_BRNO=#{VALT_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM 부점 번호

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --실제종료일 , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.2' --세부위험관리활동

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --실제종료일 , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '4.2' --세부위험관리활동

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D SET REAL_EDT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --실제종료일 , CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --변경일자 , CHG_TIME= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') --변경시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --변경조작자 WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '5.4' --세부위험관리활동
mapper.select: SELECT RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C ,REAL_EDT ,(SELECT REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '3.2' AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 ) AS REAL_EDT_CHECK FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = #{value, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --세부위험관리 구분

SELECT RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C ,REAL_EDT ,(SELECT REAL_EDT FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = '4.2' AND BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --평가회차 ) AS REAL_EDT_CHECK FROM KRBA_VALT_SCHD_D WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --기준년도 AND RSK_MNG_ACT_DTL_C = #{value, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --세부위험관리 구분
AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --평가회차
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M A SET A.EVT_FIX_YN = #{EVT_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 이벤트확정여부 */ , A.EVT_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 이벤트확정일자 */ , A.EVT_FIX_JKW_NO = #{EVT_FIX_JKW_NO, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 이벤트확정자직원번호 */ , A.CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M A SET A.VALT_FIX_YN = #{VALT_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 평가확정여부 */ , A.VALT_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 평가확정일자 */ , A.VALT_FIX_JKW_NO = #{VALT_FIX_JKW_NO, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 평가확정자직원번호 */ , A.CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET USYN = #{USYN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 사용여부 */ , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} AND CH_ID = #{CH_ID, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL((SELECT A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C || '_R' || TO_CHAR(MAX(A.CH_ID_NUM) + 1) AS CH_ID FROM (SELECT BAS_YYYY , TONGJE_FLD_C , TONGJE_PROC_C , TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C , SUBSTR(A.CH_ID, INSTR(A.CH_ID, 'R') + 1, LENGTH(A.CH_ID) - INSTR(A.CH_ID, 'R')) AS CH_ID_NUM FROM KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_FLD_C = #{TONGJE_FLD_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_PROC_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = #{TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A GROUP BY A.BAS_YYYY , A.TONGJE_FLD_C , A.TONGJE_PROC_C , A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C), #{TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '_R1') AS CH_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , A.CH_ID AS CH_ID /* 취약점ID */ , A.TONGJE_FLD_C AS TONGJE_FLD_C /* 통제영역코드 */ , B.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_FLD_NM /* 통제영역코드 */ , A.TONGJE_PROC_C AS TONGJE_PROC_C /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , C.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_PROC_NM /* 통제프로세스코드 */ , A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , D.DTL_C_NM AS TONGJE_SUB_PROC_NM /* 통제서브프로세스코드 */ , A.CH_CTNT AS CH_CTNT /* 취약점내용 */ , A.CH_CAUS_C AS CH_CAUS_C /* 취약점원인코드 */ , E.DTL_C_NM AS CH_CAUS_NM /* 취약점원인코드 */ , A.CH_TP_LV1_C AS CH_TP_LV1_C /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , A.CH_TP_LV2_C AS CH_TP_LV2_C /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , A.EFCT_GD AS EFCT_GD /* 영향도등급 */ , A.OCC_POSS_GD AS OCC_POSS_GD /* 발생가능성등급 */ , A.CH_GD AS CH_GD /* 취약성등급 */ , A.GYLJ_S_C AS GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태코드 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO AS GYLJ_JKW_NO /* 결재직원번호 */ , A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.USYN AS USYN /* 사용여부 */ , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(F.TONGJE_ACT_ID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM KRBA_TJ_ACT_M F /* RBA 통제활동 */ WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = F.BAS_YYYY AND A.CH_ID = F.CH_ID ) AS TJ_ACT_DR_YN /* 통제활동 등록여부 */ , CASE WHEN H.CH_FIX_YN = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CH_FIX_YN /* 취약점확정여부 */ FROM KRBA_INTJ_CH_M A /* RBA 내부통제 취약점 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R308') B ON A.TONGJE_FLD_C = B.DTL_C LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R309') C ON A.TONGJE_PROC_C = C.DTL_C LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R310') D ON A.TONGJE_SUB_PROC_C = D.DTL_C LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R320') E ON A.CH_CAUS_C = E.DTL_C LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M H /* RBA 위험평가 일정 */ ON A.BAS_YYYY = H.BAS_YYYY WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CH_ID = #{CH_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET CH_CTNT = #{CH_CTNT, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점내용 */ , CH_CAUS_C = #{CH_CAUS_C, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점원인코드 */ , CH_TP_LV1_C = #{CH_TP_LV1_C, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , CH_TP_LV2_C = #{CH_TP_LV2_C, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , EFCT_GD = #{EFCT_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 영향도등급 */ , OCC_POSS_GD = #{OCC_POSS_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 발생가능성등급 */ , CH_GD = #{CH_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 취약성등급 */ , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND CH_ID = #{CH_ID,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET EFCT_GD = #{EFCT_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 영향도등급 */ , OCC_POSS_GD = #{OCC_POSS_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 발생가능성등급 */ , CH_GD = #{CH_GD, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 취약성등급 */ , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ , GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND CH_ID = #{CH_ID,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M A SET A.CH_FIX_YN = #{CH_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 취약점확정여부 */ , A.CH_FIX_DT = (CASE WHEN #{CH_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} = 1 THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END) /* 취약점확정일자 */ , A.CH_FIX_JKW_NO = (CASE WHEN #{CH_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} = 1 THEN #{CH_FIX_JKW_NO, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} ELSE '' END) /* 취약점확정자직원번호 */ , A.CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ , GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET CH_CTNT = #{CH_CTNT,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점내용 */ , CH_CAUS_C = #{CH_CAUS_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점원인코드 */ , CH_TP_LV1_C = #{CH_TP_LV1_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점유형LV1코드 */ , CH_TP_LV2_C = #{CH_TP_LV2_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 취약점유형LV2코드 */ , EFCT_GD = #{EFCT_GD,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 영향도등급 */ , OCC_POSS_GD = #{OCC_POSS_GD,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 발생가능성등급 */ , CH_GD = #{CH_GD,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 취약성등급 */ , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND CH_ID = #{CH_ID,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R323' AND DTL_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}
SELECT KRBA_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL
SELECT NVL(MAX(GYLJ_SER), 0) + 1 AS GYLJ_SER FROM KRBA_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_INTJ_CH_M SET CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ , GYLJ_S_C = #{GYLJ_S_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재상태코드 */ , GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 결재일자 */ , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재직원번호 */ , GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 결재ID */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

INSERT INTO KRBA_GYLJ_H ( GYLJ_ID , GYLJ_SER , GYLJ_G_C , GYLJ_S_C , GYLJ_DT , GYLJ_JKW_NO , ROLE_ID , NOTE_CTNT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_ID,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 결재ID */ , #{GYLJ_SER,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 결재일련번호 */ , #{GYLJ_G_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재구분코드 */ , #{GYLJ_S_C,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재상태코드 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 결재일자 */ , #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 결재직원번호 */ , #{ROLE_ID,JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* ROLE_ID */ , #{NOTE_CTNT,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 비고내용 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 등록시간 */ , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 등록조작자번호 */ )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '999' THEN '' ELSE A.RSK_CATG END AS RSK_CATG , CASE WHEN A.RSK_LVL_C = '-1' OR A.RSK_LVL_C = '0' THEN '' ELSE A.RSK_LVL_C END AS RSK_LVL_C , A.RSK_EVT_CNT AS RSK_EVT_CNT , A.RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT AS RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT , CASE WHEN B.RSK_CATG_NM IS NULL THEN 'Total' ELSE A.RSK_CATG ||'.'|| B.RSK_CATG_NM END AS RSK_CATG_NM , CASE WHEN B.RSK_CATG_NM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CASE WHEN A.RSK_LVL_C = '0' THEN CASE WHEN A.RSK_CATG = '5' THEN '일반요인' ELSE 'No Level' END WHEN A.RSK_LVL_C = '-1' THEN 'Total' ELSE C.DTL_C_NM || '위험' END END AS RSK_LVL_NM FROM (SELECT NVL(A.RSK_CATG, 999) AS RSK_CATG , NVL(A.RSK_LVL_C, -1) AS RSK_LVL_C , sum(A.RSK_EVT_CNT) AS RSK_EVT_CNT , sum(A.RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT) AS RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT FROM (SELECT A.RSK_CATG AS RSK_CATG , A.DTL_C AS RSK_LVL_C , NVL(B.RSK_EVT_CNT, 0) AS RSK_EVT_CNT , NVL(B.RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT, 0) AS RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT FROM (SELECT '1' AS RSK_CATG, '0' AS DTL_C FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '1' AS RSK_CATG, DTL_C FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R332' UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS RSK_CATG, '0' AS DTL_C FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS RSK_CATG, DTL_C FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R332' UNION ALL SELECT '3' AS RSK_CATG, '0' AS DTL_C FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '3' AS RSK_CATG, DTL_C FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R332' UNION ALL SELECT '4' AS RSK_CATG, '0' AS DTL_C FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '4' AS RSK_CATG, DTL_C FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R332' UNION ALL SELECT '5' AS RSK_CATG, '0' AS DTL_C FROM DUAL ORDER BY RSK_CATG, DTL_C ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT A.RSK_CATG , NVL(A.RSK_LVL_C, 0) AS RSK_LVL_C , COUNT(DISTINCT(A.RSK_EVT)) AS RSK_EVT_CNT , COUNT(B.RSK_INDCT_NO) AS RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT FROM KRBA_RSK_EVT_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M B ON A.BAS_YYYY = B.BAS_YYYY AND A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_FAC = B.RSK_FAC AND A.RSK_EVT = B.RSK_EVT WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY,JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_LVL_C ) B ON A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG AND A.DTL_C = B.RSK_LVL_C ) A WHERE a.RSK_LVL_C != '0' or A.RSK_EVT_CNT > 0 OR A.RSK_INDCT_NO_CNT > 0 GROUP BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_LVL_C ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_RSK_CATG_I B ON A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DTL_C, DTL_C_NM FROM KRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R332') C ON A.RSK_LVL_C = C.DTL_C WHERE A.RSK_CATG != '5' OR A.RSK_LVL_C != '-1' ORDER BY A.RSK_CATG, A.RSK_LVL_C DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE KRBA_VALT_SCHD_M A SET A.INDICT_FIX_YN = #{INDICT_FIX_YN, JDBCTYPE=NUMERIC} /* 지표확정여부 */ , A.INDICT_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 지표확정일자 */ , A.INDICT_FIX_JKW_NO = #{INDICT_FIX_JKW_NO, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} /* 지표확정자직원번호 */ , A.CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 변경일자 */ , A.CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') /* 변경시간 */ , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 변경조작자 */ WHERE BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT A.BAS_YYYY AS BAS_YYYY /* 기준년도 */ , A.RSK_INDCT AS RSK_INDCT /* 위험INDICATOR */ , A.RSK_CATG AS RSK_CATG /* 위험CATEGORY */ , B.RSK_CATG_NM AS RSK_CATG_NM /* 위험CATEGORY */ , A.RSK_FAC AS RSK_FAC /* 위험FACTOR */ , A.RSK_EVT AS RSK_EVT /* 위험EVENT */ , C.RSK_EVT_NM AS RSK_EVT_NM /* 위험EVENT */ , A.RSK_LVL_C AS RSK_LVL_C /* 위험LEVEL코드 */ , A.RSK_INDCT_NO AS RSK_INDCT_NO /* 위험INDICATOR번호 */ , A.RSK_INDCT_NM AS RSK_INDCT_NM /* 위험INDICATOR명 */ , A.RSK_INDCT_CTNT AS RSK_INDCT_CTNT /* 위험INDICATOR설명 */ , CASE WHEN A.EXTR_TGT_YN = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXTR_TGT_YN /* 산출대상여부 */ , A.EST_METH AS EST_METH /* 산정방법 */ , A.VB_DEFI_CTNT AS VB_DEFI_CTNT /* 변수정의내용 */ , A.EXTR_BAS AS EXTR_BAS /* 추출기준 */ , A.RUN_FRQ AS RUN_FRQ /* 작업주기 */ , A.APR_UNIT_C AS APR_UNIT_C /* 평가단위코드 */ FROM KRBA_RSK_INDCT_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_RSK_CATG_I B ON A.RSK_CATG = B.RSK_CATG LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_RSK_EVT_I C ON A.RSK_CATG = C.RSK_CATG AND A.RSK_FAC = C.RSK_FAC AND A.RSK_EVT = C.RSK_EVT WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.LV1, A.LV2, A.LV3, A.LV4 , NVL(B.SRVC_01, '0') AS SRVC_01 , NVL(B.SRVC_02, '0') AS SRVC_02 , NVL(B.SRVC_03, '0') AS SRVC_03 , NVL(B.SRVC_04, '0') AS SRVC_04 , NVL(B.SRVC_05, '0') AS SRVC_05 , NVL(B.SRVC_06, '0') AS SRVC_06 , NVL(B.SRVC_07, '0') AS SRVC_07 , NVL(B.SRVC_08, '0') AS SRVC_08 , NVL(B.SRVC_09, '0') AS SRVC_09 , NVL(B.SRVC_10, '0') AS SRVC_10 , NVL(B.SRVC_11, '0') AS SRVC_11 , NVL(B.SRVC_12, '0') AS SRVC_12 FROM (SELECT A.ORG_LV1_C /* 위험관리활동상세코드 */ , DTL.DTL_C_NM AS LV1 /* 상세코드명 R306 */ , A.ORG_LV2_C /* 위험관리활동상세코드 */ , DTL1.DTL_C_NM AS LV2 /* 상세코드명 R307 */ , A.HGRK_BRNO /* 상위부점코드 */ , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.HGRK_BRNO,'') AS LV3 /* 상위부점명 */ , A.BRNO /* 부점코드 */ , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO,'') AS LV4 /* 부점명 */ FROM KRBA_VALT_BRNO_I A /* RBA 위험평가 부점 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL ON A.ORG_LV1_C = DTL.DTL_C AND DTL.GRP_C = 'R306' LEFT OUTER JOIN KRBA_DTL_C DTL1 ON A.ORG_LV2_C = DTL1.DTL_C AND DTL1.GRP_C = 'R307' WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT '999', '합계', '999', '' ,'999', '', '999', '' FROM DUAL ORDER BY ORG_LV1_C, ORG_LV2_C, HGRK_BRNO, BRNO ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(A.BRNO, '999') AS BRNO , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_01 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_02 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_03 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_04 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_05 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_06 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_07 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_08 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_09 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_10 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_11 , TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN A.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN A.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END)) AS SRVC_12 FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M A /* RBA 노출위험 지표추출관리 */ WHERE A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} GROUP BY ROLLUP(A.BRNO) ) B ON A.BRNO = B.BRNO

SELECT HGRK_BRNO_NM AS LV1 /* 조직체계 LV1 */ , BRNO_NM AS LV2 /* 조직체계 LV2 */ , SRVC_01 /* 보험 사망보험 */ , SRVC_02 /* 보험 생존보험 */ , SRVC_03 /* 보험 생사보험 */ , SRVC_04 /* 보험 변액보험 */ , SRVC_05 /* 보험 단체보험 */ , SRVC_06 /* 퇴직연금 기업형 */ , SRVC_07 /* 퇴직연금 개인형 */ , SRVC_08 /* 대출 약관대출 */ , SRVC_09 /* 대출 신용대출 */ , SRVC_10 /* 대출 담보대출 */ , SRVC_11 /* 대출 PF대출 */ , SRVC_12 /* 수익증권 */ , SRVC_13 /* 합계 */ FROM (SELECT AA.HGRK_BRNO , AA.HGRK_BRNO_NM , AA.BRNO , AA.BRNO_NM , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '01' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_01 --사망보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '02' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_02 --생존보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '03' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_03 --생사혼합 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '04' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_04 --변액보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '05' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_05 --단체보험 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '06' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_06 --기업형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '07' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_07 --개인형 퇴직연금 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '08' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_08 --약관대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '09' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_09 --신용대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '10' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_10 --담보대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '11' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_11 --PF대출 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C = '12' THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_12 --수익증권 , SUM(CASE WHEN AA.SRVC_G_C IN ('01','02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','11','12') THEN AA.JIPYO_V ELSE 0 END) AS SRVC_13 --합계 FROM (SELECT B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD, '') AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , A.BRNO AS BRNO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.BRNO, '') AS BRNO_NM , A.SRVC_G_C , A.JIPYO_V FROM KRBA_EXPS_EXTR_M A JOIN NIC41B B ON A.BRNO = B.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.BAS_YYYY = #{BAS_YYYY, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN, JDBCTYPE=VARCHAR} ) AA GROUP BY HGRK_BRNO, HGRK_BRNO_NM, AA.BRNO, AA.BRNO_NM ) BB WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY BB.HGRK_BRNO_NM, BB.BRNO_NM
mapper.update: MERGE INTO KRBA_GRP_C USING DUAL ON (GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET GRP_C_NM = #{GRP_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GRP_B_C = #{GRP_B_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTE_CTNT = #{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,GRP_C_NM ,GRP_B_C ,NOTE_CTNT ,CON_YN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{GRP_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{GRP_B_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{CON_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )

MERGE INTO KRBA_DTL_C USING DUAL ON ( GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DTL_C = #{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DTL_C_NM = #{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USYN = #{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HGRK_GRP_C = #{HGRK_GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HGRK_DTL_C = #{HGRK_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GRP_C ,DTL_C ,DTL_C_NM ,USYN ,SNO ,HGRK_GRP_C ,HGRK_DTL_C ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{DTL_C_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{USYN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM ,#{HGRK_GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{HGRK_DTL_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM )
mapper.select: SELECT BRNO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BRNO,'') AS BRNO_NM , INDE_RT FROM KRBA_KRI_BRNO_D WHERE RSK_INDCT = #{RSK_INDCT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND BAS_YYMM = #{BAS_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM AND RSK_GD_C = #{RSK_GD_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} --PARAM
